symptom_description: Compressor short cycling (`18 Hz`) on low-pressure cutout switch (`< 31 PSI`). Tech observed accelerated oil residue on copper brazed joint near evaporator.
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring (`Spec-854`) allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge (`-34%` loss) over past 6 months.
action_taken: Repaired pinhole braze leak at evaporator inlet header, installed new bi-flow filter drier (`P/N 9733-B`), and charged unit with precise weight of R-134a (`174 lbs`).
parts_used: Filter Drier Core Assembly, Braze Alloy, R-134a Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Cooling tower basin water temperature rising above `32°C` alarm setpoint (`+100`°C spike). Fan motor stationary (`0 Amps` draw, `460V +/- 1%` at terminals). Note: Vibration and harmonic resonance appear transmitted from CHILL-301.
root_cause: Moisture and corrosive cooling tower mist penetrated motor terminal enclosure, causing insulation breakdown (`0.64 Mega-ohms` resistance) across stator leads.
action_taken: Removed failed cooling tower fan motor using crane, installed severe-duty TEFC replacement motor (`P/N 4948-X`), renewed shaft alignment (`0.009 inch`), and sealed terminal box with RTV.
parts_used: Severe-Duty TEFC Cooling Tower Motor 25HP, Composite Coupling Element, RTV Silicone Sealant

symptom_description: Idler roller completely seized (`0 RPM rotation`). Conveyor belt sliding across stationary steel shell (`extreme` flat spot worn into roller and hot rubber smell).
root_cause: Incorrect bearing tolerance (`0.011`) led to inner race spinning on the shaft, causing friction welding and bearing lockup.
action_taken: Replaced seized rollers (`Spec-340`), installed deflector shields (`P/N 2038-C`) to prevent washdown water entry, and verified tracking.
parts_used: CEMA E Rollers, Water Deflector Shields, Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Chiller tripped on low evaporator pressure cutout (`73 PSI`) during pull-down. Sight glass on liquid line shows continuous stream of bubbles (`55%` flash gas).
root_cause: Stress fracture (`0.008 inch` crack length) on oil return line brazed joint due to excessive compressor vibration (`0.62` in/sec RMS).
action_taken: Recovered `80 lbs` refrigerant, silver-brazed cracked oil return line (`P/N 3626-A`), replaced filter drier (`Spec-801`), and leak checked with `81 PSI` nitrogen.
parts_used: Vibration Absorber Loop, Filter Drier Core Kit, 15% Silver Solder, Nitrogen Cylinder

symptom_description: High discharge temperature trip (`> 113°C`) activated. Air blowing back through intake air filter assembly during unloader cycle (`10.3 PSI`).
root_cause: Carbon deposit buildup (`0.16 inch` thick) on valve seat caused by oil carryover (`72 ppm`) and high operating temperatures (`99`°C).
action_taken: Disassembled valve pockets, cleaned carbon buildup using chemical solvent (`24 ppm` cleared), and installed new reed valve rebuild kits (`Spec-284`).
parts_used: Valve Rebuild Kit (Plates, Springs, Seats), High-Temp Head Gaskets

symptom_description: Coupling insert wearing rapidly (`minor` shedding of elastomeric dust, `0.05 inch` wear). High radial vibration (`0.47` in/sec RMS) on inboard bearing pads.
root_cause: Coupling elastomeric element failure (`31%` degradation) due to operating in high ambient temperature (`93`°C) and minor angular offset (`0.008 inch`).
action_taken: Installed upgraded high-temperature urethane coupling element (`P/N 2668-C`), shimmed motor base (`0.28 inch`), and verified vibration dropped to `0.51` in/sec RMS.
parts_used: High-Temp Urethane Coupling Element, Stainless Shim Assortment Kit

symptom_description: Flue gas oxygen (`O2`) levels abnormally low (`< 55%%`) due to steam displacement. Boiler struggling to maintain `44 PSI` header pressure.
root_cause: Waterside scale accumulation (`> 0.05 inch thick`) caused localized insulating effect, leading to tube metal overheating (`126°C`) and stress rupture.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to `105°C` (`112°C`).
parts_used: Boiler Tube Plug Kit, Refractory Cement Patch (50 lb Bag), Door Sealing Gasket

symptom_description: Strong physical vibration (`0.27` in/sec RMS) felt on motor baseplate. Spectrum analysis confirms pure once-per-revolution (`1X`) imbalance frequency.
root_cause: Uneven accumulation of heavy dried process cake and dirt (`0.07 inch` layer) inside rotor cooling channels and external fan blades.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe (`0.009 inch`), and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade (`0.71` in/sec).
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assembly, Shaft Key, Balancing Weights

symptom_description: Discharge temperature differential spiked (`+100`°C across stage 2). Compressor output flow reduced (`-50%` SCFM) with distinct clattering.
root_cause: Ingestion of particulate grit (`258 ppm` concentration) through torn air intake filter element (`60-mesh`) eroded suction valve sealing face.
action_taken: Installed new valve plates, springs, and seats (`P/N 3999-C`); torqued head bolts to factory specification (`125 ft-lbs`) and tested capacity (`30 PSI`).
parts_used: Reed Valve Replacement Pack, Valve Cover O-Ring Set, Fastener Kit

symptom_description: Primary seal weeping process liquid across gland plate (`0.005 clearance`). High frequency acoustic emission (`0.31` in/sec RMS) measured.
root_cause: Thermal shock (`168`°C spike) and lack of lubrication caused carbon seal face blistering and O-ring degradation after `27181` operating hours.
action_taken: Replaced mechanical seal faces and O-rings (`P/N 7007-C`); cleaned seal flush line orifice and verified cooling flow (`656 GPM` at `95`°C).
parts_used: Mechanical Seal Repair Kit, Viton O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Buchholz relay minor alarm active (`5.3 lbs` gas/air collection in chamber). Inspection revealed slight oil seep along main tank cover bolted flange (`0.43` vibration on fins).
root_cause: Age-related hardening, shrinkage, and compression set of nitrile rubber gaskets (`0.15 inch` gap) on main tank cover and bushing flanges after `10` years of outdoor exposure.
action_taken: De-energized and grounded transformer, lowered oil level slightly, re-torqued main cover and bushing flange bolts (`261 in-lbs` torque) in crisscross pattern, and topped off with `79 lbs` degassed mineral oil.
parts_used: Nitrile-Cork Transformer Gasket Sheet Kit, Type II Inhibited Dielectric Mineral Oil (15 Gallons), Flange Bolt Set

symptom_description: Severe grinding audible near drive coupling. Motor bearing temperature elevated (`102`°C) with `extreme` radial vibration (`0.53` in/sec RMS).
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of deep groove ball bearings (`0.021 inch` race play) after exceeding `13354` hours of continuous operating life.
action_taken: Disassembled motor, installed insulated NDE bearing and standard DE bearing (`Spec-212`), verified proper clearance (`0.009 gap`), and tested smooth running (`0.44` in/sec).
parts_used: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing Set, Grease Valve Kit, End Shield Gasket

symptom_description: Belt running `4.4 inches` off-center at tail pulley return idlers. Rubbing noise (`growling`) and persistent smell of hot rubber (`68 ppm` VOCs) near take-up assembly.
root_cause: Material buildup (`0.10 inch` sticky wet clay/bulk product) frozen or caked onto head pulley and return idler rolls, creating uneven diameter and forcing belt to track to one side.
action_taken: Locked out conveyor, manually scraped and cleaned hardened material buildup (`6.8 lbs`) from head pulley and return idlers, adjusted take-up screw tension equally (`65 ft-lbs` torque), and test ran belt to track center.
parts_used: Self-Aligning Training Idlers (Set of 3), Return Idler Rollers (4-Pack)

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`0.15 inch` depth) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles (`25 ppm`) from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced jammed internal float assembly with upgraded heavy-duty electronic zero-loss condensate drain trap (`P/N 3669-X`) and flushed separator bowl (`557 GPM`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: Dryer refrigeration compressor failing to start (`171` Amps draw). High dew point alarm (`> 93°C`) active on panel. Checked mechanical alignment and interlocks with coupled unit COMP-202 during inspection.
root_cause: Internal discharge valve reed fracture inside hermetic shell (`3.2 lbs`) causing complete loss of pumping capacity (`22.4 PSI` differential).
action_taken: Replaced failed compressor start kit (`P/N 2927-A` capacitor + relay), checked contactor tips, and verified smooth compressor running draw (`241 Amps`).
parts_used: Hard Start Capacitor Kit, Compressor Contactor 24V

symptom_description: High leakage current (`0.46 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) to earth. Stator winding temperature RTD spiked abruptly to `89`°C before trip.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 29%` above rated `82 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`158`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`Spec-673`), renewed lead lugs (`158 ft-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.41` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.018 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: Pump unable to maintain rated head (`15.8 PSI` drop from curve). Motor amp draw is `21%` lower than baseline (`81 Amps`).
root_cause: Normal mechanical degradation of wear rings (`0.015 inch` gap) and impeller shroud after `22220` hours of continuous high-load service.
action_taken: Swapped out worn impeller assembly (`Spec-693`), renewed casing wear rings to `0.011 inch` spec, and replaced shaft locking nut and key (`37 ft-lbs`).
parts_used: Replacement Impeller, Lock Washer, Shaft Nut

symptom_description: Motor shaking severely (`0.55` in/sec RMS) right after routine cleaning. No electrical anomalies detected on phase currents (`186 Amps`).
root_cause: Loss of balancing weight (`3.0 lbs` mass detached) from cooling fan or rotor end ring due to vibration fatigue (`0.66` in/sec) over `25560` hours.
action_taken: Disassembled cooling fan shroud, cleaned rotor assembly (`2.0 lbs` dirt cleared), and performed in-situ two-plane dynamic field balancing using trim weights (`Spec-375`).
parts_used: Dynamic Balancing Trim Weight Kit, Fan Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Cooling tower fan motor tripped VFD/overload breaker (`278 Amps` overcurrent). Motor frame burning hot (`98`°C) with `progressive` smoke from terminal box. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit CHILL-302.
root_cause: Cooling fan blade imbalance (`0.010 inch` pitch deviation) destroyed motor output shaft bearings (`0.016 gap`) over `9 months`.
action_taken: Replaced fan motor (`Spec-944`), adjusted fan blade pitch angle (`136 ft-lbs` bolt torque), rebalanced hub assembly, and verified vibration (`< 0.48 in/sec`).
parts_used: TEAO Cooling Tower Motor 40HP, Fan Hub Balancing Kit, Pitch Protractor Tool

symptom_description: Loud localized metallic clicking and cavitation crackling inside compressor cylinder head during compression stroke. Capacity down by `moderate` (`31%` drop). Inspected power and control interconnects running to DRYER-202 during diagnostic routine.
root_cause: Corrosive chemical vapor (`pH 6.3`) drawn through intake air stream pitted stainless reed valves during `24581` hours of runtime.
action_taken: Swapped out stage 1 and 2 valve packs (`Spec-375`), replaced O-ring seals (`Spec-838`), and verified volumetric efficiency (`+62%` flow).
parts_used: Suction Valve Pack Stage 1, Discharge Valve Pack Stage 2, Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Zero-loss drain trap displaying fault code (`drain fault 20 Hz`). Manual override button fails to discharge any condensate from separator bowl.
root_cause: Accumulation of rust scales, pipe dope, and oily emulsion sludge (`0.24 inch` thick) clogged inlet strainer of electronic zero-loss drain valve.
action_taken: Isolated and bypassed drain line, disassembled electronic zero-loss drain valve (`P/N 2667-X`), cleaned strainer mesh of rust sludge, and rebuilt solenoid valve.
parts_used: Electronic Zero-Loss Drain Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit, Drain Strainer Mesh

symptom_description: Severe cavitation noise (`grinding`) detected across pump volute with suction pressure dropping by `8.3 PSI` under maximum load.
root_cause: Inlet bellmouth vortexing and turbulence caused by low liquid level (`45%` submerged) and degraded baffle plates after `22687` hours of service.
action_taken: Installed vortex suppressor baffle inside suction tank, topped off level above `68%`, and verified steady suction pressure (`+6.8 PSI`).
parts_used: Vortex Baffle Plate Assembly, Tank Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `109`°C (`alarm > 85°C`). High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.48` in/sec RMS) detected.
root_cause: Contamination of bearing grease with ambient chemical dust (`413 ppm` solids) through defective shaft labyrinth seal (`0.018 gap`).
action_taken: Replaced DE/NDE bearings (`P/N 7732-X`), installed upgraded non-contact INPRO labyrinth shaft seals (`Spec-238`), and greased with Polyrex EM (`59%` fill).
parts_used: Precision Ball Bearing C3 Set, INPRO Labyrinth Seal Kit, Polyrex EM Grease

symptom_description: Annual boiler safety valve pop test failed: valve stuck closed during lever lifting test (`330 in-lbs` pull) or opened `17.4 PSI` above stamped ASME set pressure.
root_cause: Oversized safety valve for the current boiler load causing rapid cycling/chattering (`50 Hz cycles/min`) and seat damage.
action_taken: Replaced damaged valve with correctly sized ASME relief valve (`P/N 3856-B`), secured vent piping with spring hangers, and verified smooth lift and reseat.
parts_used: Reduced Capacity ASME Valve, Spring Pipe Hangers, Drip Pan

symptom_description: Scroll compressor making loud unusual metallic rattling and metallic clattering sound (`0.38` in/sec RMS on frame). Compressor drawing `66%` low amps (`45%` FLA). Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit TOWER-302.
root_cause: Scroll tip seal wear (`0.023 inch` gap) and flank wear caused by liquid refrigerant slugging (`84%` floodback) during low-ambient startup without crankcase heater energized.
action_taken: Recovered refrigerant circuit B, cut out worn scroll compressor, brazed in exact replacement scroll compressor assembly (`P/N 9822-C`), replaced liquid line drier, evacuated to 400 microns, and weighed in R-410A charge (`59 lbs`).
parts_used: Replacement Tandem Scroll Compressor Assembly (15HP), Bi-Flow Filter Drier Core, R-410A Refrigerant (25 lbs)

symptom_description: Belt slip alarm triggered (`drastic` RPM mismatch between motor and compressor end). Black rubber dust accumulating under drive guard (`0.10 inch` pile).
root_cause: Oil mist drip (`32 ppm` contamination) from minor shaft seal leak contaminated V-belt rubber, causing softening and loss of friction grip (`57%` grip loss).
action_taken: Swapped out glazed V-belts with new matched set (`P/N 7202-REV2`), verified pulley groove profiles for wear (`0.012 tolerance`), and torqued slide rail bolts (`113 ft-lbs`).
parts_used: Replacement Drive Belt Kit, Sheave Lock Bushings, Tension Bolts

symptom_description: Cooling tower fan motor tripped VFD/overload breaker (`175 Amps` overcurrent). Motor frame burning hot (`94`°C) with `marked` smoke from terminal box.
root_cause: Cooling fan blade imbalance (`0.007 inch` pitch deviation) destroyed motor output shaft bearings (`0.016 gap`) over `4 years`.
action_taken: Replaced fan motor (`Spec-797`), adjusted fan blade pitch angle (`130 ft-lbs` bolt torque), rebalanced hub assembly, and verified vibration (`< 0.53 in/sec`).
parts_used: TEAO Cooling Tower Motor 40HP, Fan Hub Balancing Kit, Pitch Protractor Tool

symptom_description: Fuel pressure switch (`69 PSI` setpoint) constantly tripping during high fire. Burner hunting and failing to stabilize.
root_cause: Modulating linkage motor actuator slipped (`0.003 inch`) on damper shaft, causing combustion air damper to lag behind fuel valve opening during firing rate changes.
action_taken: Cleaned burner diffuser and ignition assembly, replaced cracked pilot electrode ceramic (`P/N 8289-B`), calibrated fuel/air cam profile across all firing rates, and cleared flame safeguard lockout.
parts_used: Pilot Electrode Kit, UV Scanner Lens Cleaning Swabs, Burner Front Plate Gasket

symptom_description: Phase A terminal lug glowing red under peak shift current (`157` Amps). Thermal imaging shows `100°C` temperature at cable-to-bus bolted joint. High load demand from driven equipment (XFMR-402) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Vibration transmitted (`0.25` in/sec RMS) from nearby heavy manufacturing equipment loosened bolted terminal connections on main bus joints over `10 months`.
action_taken: Replaced heat-damaged Phase A and B terminal lugs (`P/N 2214-B`), polished copper bus interfaces, applied electrical joint compound, torqued hardware to specification, and re-scanned with IR camera under load (`joint temp stabilized at 122°C`).
parts_used: Replacement Terminal Lugs 500 MCM, Hardware & Washer Kit, Electrical Contact Cleaner

symptom_description: Chiller efficiency degraded (`kW/ton up by 14%`). Condenser water inlet/outlet delta-T reduced to `107`°C (`normal 5.5°C`).
root_cause: Bio-fouling and algae growth inside condenser tubes forming insulating biofilm layer (`0.15 inch`) after chemical biocide dosing pump failure (`1 years` lapse).
action_taken: Removed condenser water heads, cleared heavy silt/debris (`7.8 lbs`) from pass ribs, brushed tube bundle with nylon/copper brushes (`P/N 8711-REV2`), and renewed end cover gaskets.
parts_used: Water Box End Cover Gaskets, Nylon Replacement Tube Brushes (10-Pack)

symptom_description: Compressor unable to build discharge pressure above `29` PSI (`target 32 PSI`). High interstage temperature (`100`°C) on stage 1 cylinder. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit DRYER-202.
root_cause: Ingestion of particulate grit (`155 ppm` concentration) through torn air intake filter element (`60-mesh`) eroded suction valve sealing face.
action_taken: Installed new valve plates, springs, and seats (`Spec-922`); torqued head bolts to factory specification (`96 ft-lbs`) and tested capacity (`44 PSI`).
parts_used: Reed Valve Replacement Pack, Valve Cover O-Ring Set, Fastener Kit

symptom_description: Loud localized grinding buzzing/humming sound from cooling tower fan gearbox/motor coupling. Fan blades spinning erratically (`19 Hz` speed fluctuations).
root_cause: Gearbox input shaft lip seal failure (`0.10 inch` gap) allowed moisture ingress, turning lubricating gear oil into an emulsion (`32%` water).
action_taken: Drained emulsified gearbox oil, replaced input shaft seal (`P/N 4875-REV2`), installed new severe-duty motor (`Spec-350`), and refilled with `28 lbs gal` synthetic gear lube.
parts_used: Gearbox Input Seal, Synthetic Gear Oil ISO 220 (5 Gal), Severe-Duty Motor 20HP

symptom_description: Elevated approach temperature (`+117`°C) between tower basin water and wet-bulb temp (`> 5.5°C`). Fill media sagging under weight (`118 lbs lbs`) of scale deposits. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from CHILL-301.
root_cause: Solenoid valve on makeup water line stuck open (`0.019 gap` debris), causing constant overflow and dilution of expensive chemical scale inhibitors.
action_taken: Replaced makeup water solenoid valve (`P/N 3748-C`), drained basin, pressure washed `0.26 inch` scale from heater elements, and shock-dosed scale inhibitor (`58 lbs`).
parts_used: Makeup Water Solenoid 1-1/2", Basin Heater Element 5kW, Liquid Scale Inhibitor (5 Gal)

symptom_description: Thermal inspection (`IR gun`) showed seized return idler bearing reaching `124`°C. Sparks visible (`slight` hazard) under dark operating conditions.
root_cause: Normal fatigue failure and spalling of internal idler ball bearings after exceeding `10` hours of continuous operating life under heavy impact loading.
action_taken: Replaced 4 seized return idlers (`P/N 3312-A`) and 2 impact bed idlers under transfer point, cleared spilled material (`5.8 lbs`) from under structure, and verified smooth, quiet rotation.
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Impact Troughing Idler Assemblies (Set of 2), Return Rollers (4-Pack), Idler Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from transformer tank. Infrared scan showed `extreme` localized heating around LV bushing terminations (`115°C`).
root_cause: Severe harmonic current loading (`THD > 67%`) from downstream VFD drives caused elevated eddy current and stray load losses inside transformer core/windings.
action_taken: Replaced faulty cooling fan control thermostat switch (`Spec-765`), serviced fan bank electrical panel, cleaned radiator fins, and verified top oil temperature dropped to `71°C`.
parts_used: Fan Bank Control Relay, Cooling Fan Motor 460V, Type II Dielectric Oil (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Severe vibration (`0.34` in/sec) detected on fan deck. Motor cooling fins packed solidly with `0.15 inch` of cooling tower mineral scale.
root_cause: Phase loss (`4160V` dropped on Phase B) on incoming feed caused single-phasing thermal burnout (`107`°C) of cooling tower induction motor windings.
action_taken: Installed new vertical fan drive motor (`P/N 9505-A`), renewed motor shaft seal and rain canopy, greased bearings with waterproof grease (`Spec-476`), and tested VFD speed steps (`28 Hz`).
parts_used: Inverter-Duty Fan Motor Assembly, Lower Bearing Waterproof Lip Seal, Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Relief valve popped off prematurely at `63` PSI during normal operation (`nameplate setpoint 150 PSI`). Valve fails to reseat tightly after blowing down.
root_cause: Corrosion, scale, and boiler alkalinity carryover particles (`0.11 inch` debris) lodged between safety valve disc and stainless steel nozzle seat after previous simmer event.
action_taken: Isolated boiler, removed leaking safety relief valve, installed certified code-stamped replacement ASME safety relief valve (`Spec-557`) set at 150 PSI, and verified zero leakage under full operating pressure.
parts_used: ASME Section I Code-Stamped Safety Relief Valve (1.5x2.5 inch, 150 PSI), Spiral Wound Flange Gasket 1.5-inch, High-Temp Stud Bolt Set

symptom_description: Fuel consumption increased by `37%%` per ton of steam generated (`extreme` efficiency drop). Low water cutoff float chamber fouled with sludge accumulation.
root_cause: Condensate return contaminated with process calcium (`63 ppm ppm hardness`) from a leaking heat exchanger.
action_taken: Located and repaired leaking process heat exchanger (`Spec-111`), acid washed boiler waterside (`53 lbs gal` acid), and re-passivated metal surfaces.
parts_used: Process Heat Exchanger Tube Bundle, Muriatic Acid (55 Gal), Passivation Chemical

symptom_description: Evaporator pressure transducer reading `38` PSI offset compared to calibrated mechanical manifold gauge. EEV hunting wildly (`28%` open).
root_cause: Lightning strike induced surge (`460V +/- 2%` peak) destroyed 5V reference circuit on pressure transducer PCB.
action_taken: Installed new 0-500 PSI pressure transducer (`Spec-686`), verified 5VDC reference voltage (`460V +/- 1%`), and confirmed EEV step modulation stabilized.
parts_used: Pressure Transducer (0-500 PSI), 5VDC Regulating Module, Wiring Pigtail

symptom_description: Compressor discharge superheat abnormally high (`+122`°C). Leak detector picked up `164 ppm` R-134a concentration near evaporator water box.
root_cause: Leaking shaft seal on open-drive centrifugal compressor assembly caused by drying out of seal face carbon (`0.010 inch` wear) during `20 months` winter shutdown.
action_taken: Replaced open-drive compressor mechanical shaft seal assembly (`P/N 6316-X`), renewed oil separation filters (`Spec-233`), evacuated system, and verified zero leak rate (`< 177 ppm ppm`).
parts_used: Centrifugal Compressor Shaft Seal Assembly, Oil Filter Element, R-134a (65 lbs)

symptom_description: Ops reported breaker handle stuck in middle/tripped position (`322 in-lbs` resistance). Internal mechanism clicking but contacts will not latch closed.
root_cause: Broken trip latch pin (`P/N 3489-C`) inside the mechanical trip bar assembly prevented ETU solenoid from unlatching the main spring.
action_taken: Removed ACB from cassette, replaced fractured trip latch assembly (`P/N 3649-C`), relubricated entire mechanism (`Spec-806`), and verified opening time (`9 months`).
parts_used: Mechanical Trip Latch Assembly, Molykote Lubricant, ACB Alignment Tool

symptom_description: Evaporator approach temperature expanded (`84`°C). Chiller surging repeatedly (`57 Hz`) due to high lift requirements from fouled tubes.
root_cause: Ingestion of plastic debris and leaves (`3.4 lbs`) past cooling tower strainers partially plugged `54%` of condenser tube inlets.
action_taken: Removed water box covers, manually rodded out `60%` tube blockage (`6.2 lbs` removed), installed upgraded strainer baskets (`P/N 4881-A`), and reassembled with new gaskets.
parts_used: Water Box Gasket Set, Inlet Strainer Baskets (2x), Tube Cleaning Rods

symptom_description: High frequency vibration (`0.32` in/sec RMS) detected during routine condition monitoring survey on pump outboard bearing (`BPFI peak`).
root_cause: Lube oil contamination with process fluid/water (`424 ppm` moisture) caused breakdown of oil film and subsequent spalling of bearing races after `30920` hours.
action_taken: Replaced both inboard and outboard radial/thrust bearings (`P/N 7063-X`), flushed bearing housing of `384 ppm` debris, and added synthetic ISO VG 68 oil.
parts_used: SKF Outboard Angular Contact Bearing, Inboard Roller Bearing, ISO VG 68 Lube Oil

symptom_description: Pump lost power suddenly (`0 Amps` draw). Cable strain relief failed allowing cable weight (`179 lbs`) to rub against concrete pit wall (`0.49` in/sec vibration).
root_cause: Thermal overload (`134 Amps` sustained draw) in ambient sunlight (`133`°C outside air) melted inner PVC conductor insulation inside conduit drop.
action_taken: Replaced power cable run from disconnect (`460V` rating) to submersible gland (`P/N 5993-B`), installed UV-resistant conduit jacket, and megger tested (`0.48 Mega-ohms`).
parts_used: Submersible Power Cable (75ft), UV Conduit Jacket, Entry Gland Assembly

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`0.13 inch` depth) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Accumulation of rust scales, pipe dope, and oily emulsion sludge (`0.12 inch` thick) clogged inlet strainer of electronic zero-loss drain valve.
action_taken: Isolated and bypassed drain line, disassembled electronic zero-loss drain valve (`P/N 7176-A`), cleaned strainer mesh of rust sludge, and rebuilt solenoid valve.
parts_used: Electronic Zero-Loss Drain Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit, Drain Strainer Mesh

symptom_description: Compressor cycling on high temp interlock (`> 134°C`). Cooling fan running (`50 Hz`) but `noticeable` temperature drop across aftercooler (`84`°C out). Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit DRYER-201.
root_cause: Thermal bypass valve failed in closed position (`stuck at 137°C`), preventing hot oil from circulating through external cooler core under `60` Amps load.
action_taken: Replaced faulty thermostatic oil bypass valve assembly (`P/N 1783-B`), topped off compressor oil level (`45 lbs`), and cleaned cooler core exterior.
parts_used: Thermostatic Oil Bypass Valve Kit, Compressor Oil (1 Gal), O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Megger insulation resistance check across panel busbars to ground measured `0.19 Mega-ohms` (`critical hazard threshold < 1.0 M-ohm`).
root_cause: Entry of rodents/pests (`4.2 lbs` found) into distribution cabinet through unsealed floor conduits caused direct phase-to-ground short across energized bus.
action_taken: Replaced tracked busbar standoff insulators, cleaned copper bus surfaces, installed new polycarbonate phase barriers (`P/N 9227-B`), and verified insulation resistance (`0.03 Mega-ohms`) across all phases before re-energization.
parts_used: Replacement Standoff Insulators (Pack of 8), Phase Barrier Kit, Industrial Contact & Cabinet Cleaner

symptom_description: Loud intermittent metallic clicking and grinding inside compressor cylinder head during compression stroke. Capacity down by `concerning` (`50%` drop).
root_cause: Corrosive chemical vapor (`pH 8.9`) drawn through intake air stream pitted stainless reed valves during `26033` hours of runtime.
action_taken: Swapped out stage 1 and 2 valve packs (`Spec-820`), replaced O-ring seals (`P/N 7124-REV2`), and verified volumetric efficiency (`+27%` flow).
parts_used: Suction Valve Pack Stage 1, Discharge Valve Pack Stage 2, Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Ops reported breaker handle stuck in middle/tripped position (`337 in-lbs` resistance). Internal mechanism clicking but contacts will not latch closed.
root_cause: Blown control power fuse (`144A`) for the electronic trip unit due to a shorted electrolytic capacitor (`0.12 Mega-ohms`) on the trip unit PCB.
action_taken: Installed new ETU board (`P/N 8640-B`), replaced control power fuses (`103A`), loaded coordination settings file, and verified primary injection trip points.
parts_used: ETU Control Board Replacement, Control Power Fuses (2A), Programming Cable

symptom_description: Pump lost power suddenly (`0 Amps` draw). Cable strain relief failed allowing cable weight (`179 lbs`) to rub against concrete pit wall (`0.71` in/sec vibration).
root_cause: Thermal overload (`296 Amps` sustained draw) in ambient sunlight (`170`°C outside air) melted inner PVC conductor insulation inside conduit drop.
action_taken: Replaced power cable run from disconnect (`460V` rating) to submersible gland (`P/N 4190-A`), installed UV-resistant conduit jacket, and megger tested (`0.08 Mega-ohms`).
parts_used: Submersible Power Cable (75ft), UV Conduit Jacket, Entry Gland Assembly

symptom_description: Chiller unable to reach `100%` capacity (`stalled at 79%` load). Oil recovery system fault indicating high `423 ppm` refrigerant in oil sump.
root_cause: Leaking shaft seal on open-drive centrifugal compressor assembly caused by drying out of seal face carbon (`0.022 inch` wear) during `1 years` winter shutdown.
action_taken: Replaced open-drive compressor mechanical shaft seal assembly (`Spec-380`), renewed oil separation filters (`Spec-675`), evacuated system, and verified zero leak rate (`< 458 ppm ppm`).
parts_used: Centrifugal Compressor Shaft Seal Assembly, Oil Filter Element, R-134a (65 lbs)

symptom_description: Dryer refrigeration compressor hot to touch (`82`°C) and tripping on low suction pressure cutoff (`20.2 PSI`) during afternoon shift.
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring (`Spec-461`) allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge (`-65%` loss) over past 6 months.
action_taken: Repaired pinhole braze leak at evaporator inlet header, installed new bi-flow filter drier (`P/N 9850-B`), and charged unit with precise weight of R-134a (`22 lbs`).
parts_used: Filter Drier Core Assembly, Braze Alloy, R-134a Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Ops reported top cover rubber delaminating (`extreme` separation) and severe edge gouging along `2.9 ft` of conveyor belt carrying surface.
root_cause: Sharp piece of tramp metal (`P/N 2454-C`) or structural steel bracket broke off and wedged between skirt board and belt surface at loading chute, gouging belt during transit.
action_taken: Locked out unit, trimmed frayed belt edges, repaired 4-foot longitudinal top cover gouge using cold-cure urethane repair compound (`Spec-562`) and rubber repair strips, and readjusted skirt board clamps.

symptom_description: Dry patches (`17%` un-wetted area) visible across top of PVC fill media. Hot water basin overflowing (`293 GPM`) around distribution basin edges.
root_cause: Structural collapse of fiberglass distribution header pipe (`2.8 ft` section) due to winter freeze damage, dumping water straight into basin.
action_taken: Replaced shattered fiberglass header section (`P/N 3973-A`), installed new target nozzles (`Spec-568`), flushed system of fiberglass shards (`3.0 lbs`), and verified distribution pattern.

root_cause: Accumulation of conductive industrial dust, carbon soot, and high ambient moisture (`14%` RH) across busbar standoff insulators formed a tracking path to ground (`0.46 Mega-ohms`).
action_taken: Isolated main feed, cleaned soot and carbon tracking (`4.0 lbs`) from panel interior using dielectric solvent (`Spec-689`), replaced all 6 Glastic busbar support standoff insulators, and performed 1000V Megger test (`reading > 0.41 Mega-ohms`).

symptom_description: Evaporator approach temperature expanded to `87`°C (`normal < 3°C`). Discharge line frost (`0.07 inch` buildup) indicating starved evaporator coil.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole (`0.022 inch` diameter) developed inside air-to-refrigerant heat exchanger due to acidic condensate (`pH 5.9`) accumulation.
action_taken: Located leak using electronic leak detector, repaired rubbed copper tubing section, replaced liquid line filter drier (`Spec-961`), evacuated system, and recharged with R-407C (`150 lbs`).

symptom_description: Ops reported pump running hot (`135`°C) with severely restricted output flow (`42%` flow drop). Suspect ragball or solid debris blockage in volute.

symptom_description: Conveyor stalled completely during heavy surge loading. Fluid coupling thermal fuse plug melted (`132°C`), discharging coupling oil (`33%` pool on floor).

symptom_description: Nitrogen blanket pressure dropping rapidly (`-18.3 PSI/day`). Oil weeping (`699 oz/hr`) around LV bushing mounting flange.

symptom_description: Compressor cabinet temperature high (`100`°C). Discharge air temp exceeding `142`°C with heavy heat radiation from cooler core.

symptom_description: Conveyor stalled completely during heavy surge loading. Fluid coupling thermal fuse plug melted (`110°C`), discharging coupling oil (`68%` pool on floor).

symptom_description: Acoustic emission levels spiked `12%` across thrust bearing housing. Oil sampling showed elevated iron and copper wear particles (`233 ppm`).
