symptom_description: Elevated temperatures on both motor and pump inboard bearing housings (`84`°C) with excessive humming noise (`49 Hz` frequency). Unit overdrawing current when MOTOR-102 operates at peak capacity.

symptom_description: Motor shaking severely (`0.59` in/sec RMS) right after routine cleaning. No electrical anomalies detected on phase currents (`60 Amps`).
root_cause: Improper key length (`0.021 inch` excess key protruding) installed on drive coupling extension during previous coupling replacement.
action_taken: Replaced half-key on coupling shaft extension with precision stepped key (`P/N 5519-A`), re-laser aligned (`0.017 gap`), and verified 1X vibration dropped (`0.60` in/sec).

symptom_description: High superheat reading (`> 101°C` at compressor suction) and low subcooling (`< 2°C`). Chiller running `100%` capacity but leaving water `90`°C high.
root_cause: Loose flare nut connection (`98 ft-lbs` under-torqued) on sight glass or filter drier fitting allowing slow loss (`-55%` volume) of R-410A/R-407C over past cooling season.

symptom_description: Power factor / Tan-Delta test on transformer windings increased to `22%` (`normal < 0.5%`). Furan analysis indicates severe Kraft paper insulation aging (`DP < 43 Hz`).
root_cause: Loose core clamping bolts (`61 ft-lbs` under-torqued) caused core lamination vibration (`44 Hz`), mechanically abrading the winding insulation (`0.010 gap`).
action_taken: Untanked core assembly, tightened loose core clamps (`290 in-lbs` torque), repaired abraded insulation with crepe paper taping (`Spec-409`), and baked core to dry.
parts_used: Crepe Paper Insulation Tape, Cotton Tying Cord, Varnish Coating (1 Gal)

parts_used: Precision Stepped Shaft Key, Coupling Shim Pack

symptom_description: Multiple distribution target nozzles completely plugged (`40%` blocked) with debris, causing heavy localized channeling and splashing inside tower.
root_cause: Accumulation of wind-blown leaves, plastic wrappers, and organic debris (`6.4 lbs`) in hot water distribution basin plugging nozzle orifices (`0.009 gap`).
action_taken: Removed hot water basin covers, manually cleared leaves/debris (`4.1 lbs`) from all distribution nozzles, pressure washed basin (`61 PSI`), and chlorinated loop.
parts_used: Polypropylene Target Spray Nozzles (15-Pack), Basin Cover Fasteners

symptom_description: Noticeable significant crackling and popping sounds heard from pump suction casing. Discharge pressure is drastic erratic under normal load (`+/- 9.0 PSI`).
root_cause: Operating pump excessively far out beyond its Best Efficiency Point (BEP) by `53%` during high production demand (`716 GPM`).
action_taken: Adjusted VFD speed profile (`57 Hz`) and trimmed discharge flow to keep pump operating within optimal BEP parameters (`+/- 54%` curve).
parts_used: None

symptom_description: VFD fault code indicating over-current (`175 A`). Motor smells of burnt varnish (`285 ppm` VOCs).
root_cause: Tail pulley or take-up assembly jammed with packed solid material (`2.7 lbs`), creating immense frictional drag against belt movement.
action_taken: Cleared mechanical jam inside head pulley discharge chute, re-torqued motor terminal connections (`244 in-lbs`), checked gearbox oil level, and verified VFD current stability across full speed range (`55 Hz Hz`).
parts_used: Thermal Overload Relay Element, Take-up Slide Lubricant (1 Can), Troughing Idler Rollers (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Compressed air dew point reading normal (`108`°C) but downstream coalescing filters rapidly flooding with liquid condensate (`50%` saturation).
root_cause: Solenoid coil burnout (`480V` supply spike) on automatic condensate drain valve (`open circuit` measured across coil terminals).
action_taken: Replaced burned-out 24V solenoid coil (`Spec-992`) and internal diaphragm repair kit on automatic condensate drain assembly; tested manual blowdown (`38 PSI`).
parts_used: 24V Drain Solenoid Coil, Diaphragm Repair Kit, Bowl O-Ring

symptom_description: Conveyor drive motor tripped VFD/thermal overload relay (`motor current spiked to 207 Amps vs 32A FLA`). Drive pulley stationary while motor humming.
root_cause: Loss of lagging (`83%` missing) on the drive pulley causing slip. The control system ramps up speed (`24 Hz Hz`) to compensate, overloading the motor.
action_taken: Re-lagged drive pulley (`P/N 9531-X`) with diamond tread rubber (`0.12 inch` thick), tightened take-up (`319 in-lbs` tension), and verified zero slip with tachometer.
parts_used: Ceramic Lagging Strips, Cold Vulcanizing Adhesive, Tensioning Bolts

symptom_description: Inboard bearing temperature reached `95`°C (`alarm setpoint 85°C`). Severe severe whining sound (`buzzing/humming`) audible at `45 Hz` operating speed.
root_cause: Improper bearing preload and excessive axial thrust load (`62%` above design) caused premature cage fracture and rolling element skidding.
action_taken: Replaced thrust bearing housing assembly (`P/N 7926-A`), renewed oil seals, adjusted axial preload shims (`0.18 inch`), and verified dynamic balance (`0.65` in/sec).
parts_used: Radial Bearing, Thrust Bearing Set, Housing Gasket

symptom_description: High discharge temperature trip (`> 104°C`) activated. Air blowing back through intake air filter assembly during unloader cycle (`22.0 PSI`).
root_cause: Fatigue fracture of stainless steel valve plate/reed inside discharge valve assembly due to billions of cyclic flexures over `11824` hours.
action_taken: Isolated compressor, removed cylinder head, and replaced complete suction and discharge valve assemblies (`P/N 4051-A`) and gaskets (`Spec-153`).
parts_used: Suction and Discharge Valve Assembly Kit, Cylinder Head Gasket Set

symptom_description: Compressor contactor chatting rapidly (`47 Hz`). Hermetic dome temperature normal but unit drawing `63 Amps` (`target 109 Amps`).
root_cause: Internal discharge valve reed fracture inside hermetic shell (`3.3 lbs`) causing complete loss of pumping capacity (`15.7 PSI` differential).
action_taken: Replaced failed compressor start kit (`Spec-234` capacitor + relay), checked contactor tips, and verified smooth compressor running draw (`68 Amps`).
parts_used: Hard Start Capacitor Kit, Compressor Contactor 24V

symptom_description: Hot gas bypass valve fully open (`60%`) but dew point remains high (`111`°C). Leak detection dye visible near condenser return bend.
root_cause: Thermal expansion stress fractured condenser coil U-bend brazed joint (`0.012 gap` crack) due to blocked cooling fan (`137`°C).
action_taken: Brazed fractured condenser U-bend (`Spec-209`), pressure tested with nitrogen (`43 PSI`), evacuated to 300 microns, and weighed in `55 lbs` of R-134a.
parts_used: Condenser U-Bend Fitting, Nitrogen Test Gas (1 Cyl), R-134a (6 lbs)

symptom_description: Transformer main oil level gauge showing `77%` low level (`near bottom mark`). Noticeable distinct dielectric oil pooling (`2.0 ft` spread) on concrete pad under radiator banks.
root_cause: Age-related hardening, shrinkage, and compression set of nitrile rubber gaskets (`0.15 inch` gap) on main tank cover and bushing flanges after `12` years of outdoor exposure.
action_taken: De-energized and grounded transformer, lowered oil level slightly, re-torqued main cover and bushing flange bolts (`344 in-lbs` torque) in crisscross pattern, and topped off with `23 lbs` degassed mineral oil.
parts_used: Nitrile-Cork Transformer Gasket Sheet Kit, Type II Inhibited Dielectric Mineral Oil (15 Gallons), Flange Bolt Set

symptom_description: Water sight level glass on moisture separator bowl completely full of liquid (`55%` capacity). Electronic drain solenoid clicking but no water discharging.
root_cause: Winter freeze-up (`ambient < 0°C`) of condensate drain discharge line (`3.9 ft` run) caused ice blockage, backing up water into separator.
action_taken: Thawed frozen discharge line with heat gun, installed self-regulating heat trace cable (`Spec-625`) over `1.6 ft` run, and insulated drain piping.
parts_used: Heat Trace Cable Kit (10ft), Pipe Insulation, Zip Ties

symptom_description: Acoustic emission levels spiked `34%` across thrust bearing housing. Oil sampling showed elevated iron and copper wear particles (`144 ppm`).
root_cause: Thermal degradation and hardening of bearing grease (`159`°C operating environment) over `10 months`, resulting in severe metal-to-metal friction.
action_taken: Cleaned grease cavities, installed precision C3 clearance roller bearings (`Spec-786`), packed with Polyrex EM grease (`35%` fill), and verified low vibration (`0.46` in/sec).
parts_used: Precision Roller Bearing Set C3, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube), Lip Seal Kit

symptom_description: Nitrogen blanket pressure dropping rapidly (`-11.6 PSI/day`). Oil weeping (`747 oz/hr`) around LV bushing mounting flange.
root_cause: Gasket failure (`87%` torn) on the sudden pressure relay (`SPR`) mounting flange allowed pressurized nitrogen and oil mist to escape.
action_taken: Drained `20 lbs` of oil, removed LV bushing, cleaned sealing surfaces (`3.7 lbs` removed), installed new molded nitrile gasket (`Spec-487`), and reassembled.
parts_used: LV Bushing Molded Gasket, Type II Oil (55 Gal Drum), Contact Cleaner Spray

symptom_description: VFD indicating ground fault trip on cooling tower fan feed. Megger test shows dead short (`0.05 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) on motor leads. Also inspected CHILL-302 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Cooling fan blade imbalance (`0.003 inch` pitch deviation) destroyed motor output shaft bearings (`0.011 gap`) over `1 years`.
action_taken: Replaced fan motor (`P/N 3667-C`), adjusted fan blade pitch angle (`371 in-lbs` bolt torque), rebalanced hub assembly, and verified vibration (`< 0.41 in/sec`).
parts_used: TEAO Cooling Tower Motor 40HP, Fan Hub Balancing Kit, Pitch Protractor Tool

symptom_description: Loud noticeable buzzing and arcing sound (`thumping`) heard inside distribution panel enclosure. Localized localized discoloration on bus connection bolts (`30%` torque loss).
root_cause: Overtightening (`136 ft-lbs` torque) during previous PM stretched the grade 5 bolt past its yield point, causing loss of clamping force (`0.006 gap`).
action_taken: Drilled out yielded hardware (`P/N 4382-C`), replaced with Grade 8 bolts and Belleville washers (`Spec-444`), torqued to `102 ft-lbs`, and applied torque seal indicator mark.
parts_used: Grade 8 Bolt Assortment Kit, Torque Seal Marker (Red), Belleville Washers

symptom_description: Chiller circuit B unable to build differential pressure (`discharge/suction pressures nearly equal` at `22 PSI`). Scroll compressor running hot (`100`°C).
root_cause: Liquid wash-out of bearing lubrication (`176 ppm` oil dilution) during extended periods of low superheat (`< 1°C`) destroyed upper orbital bearing.
action_taken: Cut out destroyed tandem scroll pair (`Spec-139`), installed new manifolds and compressors, flushed acid oil with RX-11 (`P/N 8104-A`), and verified superheat (`99°C`).
parts_used: Tandem Scroll Compressor Set, RX-11 Flush Solvent (2 Cans), Suction Filter Core, R-410A (45 lbs)

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame (`135`°C) and `62%` drop in operating speed (`RPM`). Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to PUMP-102.
root_cause: Voltage unbalance of `13%` across supply lines (`480V`) caused `27%` increase in localized rotor and stator copper heating (`122`°C).
action_taken: Installed auxiliary cooling blower unit (`P/N 6970-REV2`) for low-speed VFD operation (`< 53 Hz`) and cleaned existing motor frame cooling channels (`49%` airflow restored).
parts_used: Auxiliary Forced-Air Blower Kit 460V, Fan Shroud Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: Found gradual fluid dripping constantly from pump stuffing box area (`~3.2 lbs/hr`). Pool of process fluid accumulating on baseplate. Ops reported load fluctuations on MOTOR-102 coinciding with this fault.
root_cause: Mechanical seal faces scored due to abrasive particles (`15 ppm` solids) in process fluid and inadequate seal flush filtration (`400 micron filter blinded`).
action_taken: Removed pump casing, replaced cartridge mechanical seal assembly (`Spec-214`), renewed `150 micron` flush filter, and flushed seal supply piping.
parts_used: Cartridge Mechanical Seal Assembly, Casing Gasket, Flush Filter Element

symptom_description: Annual boiler safety valve pop test failed: valve stuck closed during lever lifting test (`331 in-lbs` pull) or opened `14.0 PSI` above stamped ASME set pressure.
root_cause: Normal mechanical seat wear and wire-drawing erosion (`0.013 inch` groove) across sealing faces from prolonged minor steam weeping.
action_taken: Installed new factory-calibrated and sealed safety relief valve (`P/N 1973-A`), re-supported discharge vent pipe to ensure zero weight on valve body, and verified reseating tightness.
parts_used: Replacement ASME Safety Relief Valve, Flange Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Megger test of compressor windings shows dead short to ground (`0.25 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance). Distinct slight electrical burn smell from terminal box. Unit overdrawing current when COMP-202 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Liquid slugging (`30%` liquid refrigerant return) destroyed scroll compressor involute plates during abrupt hot gas bypass failure.
action_taken: Cut out failed compressor shell, flushed system of acidic burnout oil (`Spec-761` solvent), installed suction filter drier, brazed new scroll (`P/N 6591-X`), and charged (`39 lbs`).
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Core, Burnout Cleanup Filter, RX-11 Flush Solvent (1 Can), R-407C (6 lbs)

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`2.3 ft` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `109`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Localized waterside oxygen pitting corrosion (`0.12 inch` deep) inside fire tubes due to intermittent failure of boiler feedwater deaerator (`153°C` operation) / oxygen scavenger chemical dosing.
action_taken: Isolated and cooled down boiler, opened front and rear doors, identified 3 leaking fire tubes using hydrostatic test (`81 PSI`), reamed out and cut out failed tubes, rolled and beaded in new seamless steel boiler tubes (`P/N 9945-REV2`), and hydro-tested to 150 PSI.
parts_used: Seamless Steel Boiler Tubes 2.5-inch OD (Bundle of 4), Refractory Door Rope Gasket Kit, Tubesheet Ferrules

symptom_description: Conveyor belt mistracking severely (`drastic` off-center toward right side). Belt edge rubbing against steel conveyor frame (`chattering` squealing sound and rubber dust). Also inspected MOTOR-602 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Uneven loading (`26%` biased to one side) from the feed chute pushing the belt off-center.
action_taken: Cut out crooked mechanical splice, re-squared belt ends using transit (`moderate` tolerance), and installed new mechanical fasteners (`P/N 4331-A`).
parts_used: Mechanical Splice Kit, Belt Squaring Tool, Nylon Splice Pin

symptom_description: Oil moisture content critically high (`32 ppm ppm`). Breakdown voltage (dielectric strength) dropped to `480V kV` (`warning < 30kV`). Unit overdrawing current when PANEL-401 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Moisture ingress into dielectric oil (`water content > 18 ppm ppm`) absorbed by cellulose paper insulation, drastically reducing breakdown voltage capacity (`< 460V +/- 2% kV`).
action_taken: Performed on-site vacuum oil processing and Fuller's earth reclamation (`Spec-221`) to remove polar compounds and acids, dried winding cellulose, and re-tested power factor (`Tan-Delta < 0.4%`).
parts_used: Vacuum Rig Filter Elements, Type II Dielectric Oil Top-off (30 Gal), Indicating Silica Gel Desiccant

symptom_description: Routine inspection of oil chamber sampling port revealed milky, emulsified oil (`severe` water contamination, `255 ppm` moisture).
root_cause: Dry running during low wet-well level (`43%` submerged) caused extreme frictional heating (`130`°C) and thermal cracking of ceramic seal rings.
action_taken: Replaced thermal-cracked seal faces with silicon carbide/silicon carbide seal (`P/N 2857-A`), renewed float switch setpoints, and pressure tested chamber (`35 PSI`).
parts_used: SiC/SiC Mechanical Seal Kit, Float Switch Assembly, Chamber Gasket

symptom_description: Stage 2 intercooling pressure fluctuating (`55 PSI +/- 68%`). Severe acoustic impact (`high-pitched squealing`) detected inside discharge valve pocket. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on DRYER-201.
root_cause: Broken valve spring (`P/N 5158-A`) allowed valve disc to flutter and slam against guard, cracking valve seating surface under `39 PSI` cycling.
action_taken: Replaced broken stage 1 and stage 2 discharge valve assemblies (`P/N 6392-X`), renewed head gaskets, and replaced intake air filter element (`P/N 1355-C`).
parts_used: Stage 1 Discharge Valve Assembly, Stage 2 Valve Kit, Intake Filter Element

symptom_description: Transformer emitting abnormal buzzing/crackling sound inside tank (`0.52` in/sec RMS on shell). Ultrasonic acoustic survey detected partial discharge (`46 Hz` pulses/sec) near HV winding. High load demand from driven equipment (PANEL-402) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Long-term thermal degradation and chemical depolymerization of Kraft paper winding insulation caused by operating at sustained high load temperatures (`> 117°C`) over `14` years.
action_taken: Scheduled emergency outage, connected mobile vacuum oil purification/dehydration rig, circulated and dried oil to `< 436 ppm ppm` moisture, and added metal passivator chemical (`Spec-715`).
parts_used: Fuller's Earth Filter Cartridges (Set of 6), Silica Gel Breather Desiccant Charge (10 lbs), Oil Passivator Additive (1 Gal)

symptom_description: A flap of rubber (`0.23 inch` thick) peeled back on the belt surface, catching on the primary cleaner (`50 Hz` impacts/min).
root_cause: Mechanical fastener/lacing splice pulled apart (`55%` tension) and caught on fixed belt scraper blade, ripping belt edge open.
action_taken: Performed hot vulcanized splice repair (`100°C`) on torn belt section, removed jammed tramp metal (`4.3 lbs`) from transfer chute, and installed new heavy-duty urethane skirt board sealing strips.
parts_used: Hot Vulcanizing Splice Kit & Gum Rubber, Primary Belt Cleaner Scraper Blade, Urethane Skirt Strip

symptom_description: Conveyor belt mistracking severely (`progressive` off-center toward right side). Belt edge rubbing against steel conveyor frame (`high-pitched squealing` squealing sound and rubber dust). Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from MOTOR-602.
root_cause: Material buildup (`0.10 inch` sticky wet clay/bulk product) frozen or caked onto head pulley and return idler rolls, creating uneven diameter and forcing belt to track to one side.
action_taken: Locked out conveyor, manually scraped and cleaned hardened material buildup (`4.9 lbs`) from head pulley and return idlers, adjusted take-up screw tension equally (`326 in-lbs` torque), and test ran belt to track center.
parts_used: Self-Aligning Training Idlers (Set of 3), Return Idler Rollers (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Stator phase winding failed during high-load ramp (`66 Amps`). Polarization Index (PI) dropped to `1.0%` with noticeable smoke from terminal box.
root_cause: Voltage spikes (`> 480V +/- 1% peak`) from VFD switching transients exceeded insulation dielectric breakdown threshold (`0.19 Mega-ohms` remaining resistance).
action_taken: Swapped out failed motor with certified warehouse spare unit (`Spec-157`); sent damaged stator for rewind and core loss testing (`3.0%`).
parts_used: Complete Replacement Induction Motor 50HP, Coupling Key, Shim Pack

symptom_description: Radial vibration velocity (`0.23` in/sec RMS) peaking at `1X` running speed (`46 Hz`). Phase angle steady across drive-end bearing pedestal.
root_cause: Improper key length (`0.013 inch` excess key protruding) installed on drive coupling extension during previous coupling replacement.
action_taken: Replaced half-key on coupling shaft extension with precision stepped key (`Spec-750`), re-laser aligned (`0.010 gap`), and verified 1X vibration dropped (`0.29` in/sec).
parts_used: Precision Stepped Shaft Key, Coupling Shim Pack

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after `23531` hours of continuous running (`304 Amps`). Cooling fan shroud feels excessive hot to the touch.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 43 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling, leading to severe thermal stagnation (`117`°C).
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage (`480V`), deep cleaned motor heat sink fins, and verified winding temp dropped (`-105`°C).
parts_used: Cooling Fan Blade Assembly, Shroud Fasteners, Fan Guard Grid

symptom_description: Coupling bolts loosening (`minor` play) with accelerated rattling (`high-pitched squealing`). Temperature across coupling guard elevated to `104`°C.
root_cause: Soft foot condition under motor baseplate (`0.023 inch` gap on right rear foot) causing structural distortion during anchor bolt torquing (`44 ft-lbs`).
action_taken: Replaced worn elastomeric coupling insert (`P/N 4483-REV2`) and re-laser aligned pump/motor train to tight tolerance (`< 0.007 inch` offset).
parts_used: Omega Coupling Half and Element

symptom_description: Chiller unable to reach `100%` capacity (`stalled at 49%` load). Oil recovery system fault indicating high `349 ppm` refrigerant in oil sump.
root_cause: Thermal expansion cycles (`102`°C swings) loosened flange bolts (`83 ft-lbs` under-torqued) on compressor suction elbow connection O-ring groove.
action_taken: Replaced degraded compressor suction elbow O-ring seal (`Spec-946`) and rupture disc assembly, pulled 24-hour deep vacuum test, and charged unit with 120 lbs of R-134a (`18 lbs`).
parts_used: Suction Elbow O-Ring Kit, Rupture Disc Gasket, R-134a Refrigerant (100 lbs)

symptom_description: Main molded case circuit breaker (`MCCB`) failed to trip during downstream short circuit event (`240 Amps` fault), causing upstream feeder breaker to clear fault. Checked mechanical alignment and interlocks with coupled unit XFMR-401 during inspection.
root_cause: Broken trip latch pin (`P/N 1806-B`) inside the mechanical trip bar assembly prevented ETU solenoid from unlatching the main spring.
action_taken: Removed ACB from cassette, replaced fractured trip latch assembly (`P/N 3041-A`), relubricated entire mechanism (`P/N 6152-B`), and verified opening time (`4 years`).
parts_used: Mechanical Trip Latch Assembly, Molykote Lubricant, ACB Alignment Tool

symptom_description: Coupling insert wearing rapidly (`severe` shedding of elastomeric dust, `0.25 inch` wear). High radial vibration (`0.31` in/sec RMS) on inboard bearing pads. Checked mechanical alignment and interlocks with coupled unit MOTOR-102 during inspection.
root_cause: Coupling elastomeric element failure (`31%` degradation) due to operating in high ambient temperature (`116`°C) and minor angular offset (`0.009 inch`).
action_taken: Installed upgraded high-temperature urethane coupling element (`P/N 6305-C`), shimmed motor base (`0.07 inch`), and verified vibration dropped to `0.38` in/sec RMS.
parts_used: High-Temp Urethane Coupling Element, Stainless Shim Assortment Kit

symptom_description: Severe cavitation noise (`grinding`) detected across pump volute with suction pressure dropping by `6.0 PSI` under maximum load.
root_cause: Insufficient Net Positive Suction Head Available (NPSHA) caused by partially clogged suction basket strainer (`42%` flow restriction, suction drop of `17.7 PSI`).
action_taken: Cleaned suction inlet basket strainer (`100-mesh`), removed `5.0 lbs` of debris, and throttled discharge valve to restore `7.3 feet` of NPSH margin.
parts_used: Suction Strainer Mesh Basket, Flange Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Loud buzzing/humming and metallic clattering from bearing pedestal (`108`°C). Oil level check showed gradual discoloration and `26 ppm` metal debris. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from MOTOR-102.
root_cause: Lube oil contamination with process fluid/water (`16 ppm` moisture) caused breakdown of oil film and subsequent spalling of bearing races after `12838` hours.
action_taken: Replaced both inboard and outboard radial/thrust bearings (`P/N 5008-REV2`), flushed bearing housing of `45 ppm` debris, and added synthetic ISO VG 68 oil.
parts_used: SKF Outboard Angular Contact Bearing, Inboard Roller Bearing, ISO VG 68 Lube Oil

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `124`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `98`°C (`alarm limit 140°C`). Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on PUMP-102.
root_cause: Broken external cooling fan blade (`23%` fan area lost) caused loss of turbulent airflow across cooling ribs under `75 Amps` load.
action_taken: Replaced damaged polypropylene cooling fan (`P/N 1761-B`), straightened bent fan cowl (`0.008 gap`), and verified full airflow restoration (`76`°C housing).
parts_used: Polypropylene Replacement Cooling Fan, Cowl Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Buchholz relay tripped transformer off-line. Gas sample from relay analyzed as `64%` combustible (fault gases). Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on PANEL-402.
root_cause: Sludge formation (`0.05 inch` thick) from oxidized dielectric oil deposited onto winding ducts, restricting localized natural oil convection and creating severe thermal hotspots (`124°C`).
action_taken: Processed transformer dielectric oil through vacuum dehydration unit for `15061` hours, replaced silica gel breather desiccant (`Spec-148`), and recommended load reduction (`< 31%`) pending complete core/winding overhaul.
parts_used: Silica Gel Desiccant Beads (15 lbs), Oil Filter Cores, Gasket Set

symptom_description: High axial vibration (`0.49` in/sec RMS) and abnormal phase relationship (`63%` phase shift across coupling) detected during vibration survey.
root_cause: Foundation settling and normal vibration shifting over `13 months` degraded precision laser alignment (`0.009 inch` parallel offset, `0.011 inch/10 inch` angular).
action_taken: Loosened flange bolts to relieve `129 ft-lbs` pipe strain, re-torqued baseplate hold-down bolts (`84 ft-lbs`), and completed full alignment (`0.012 inch`).
parts_used: None

symptom_description: Drive motor drawing continuous `150` Amps (`115%` rating). Gearbox output shaft rotating sluggishly with significant laboring noise (`screeching`).
root_cause: Severe mechanical binding and increased drag (`50 ft-lbs` required) caused by multiple seized idler rollers and caked material dragging against bottom belt return span.
action_taken: Shoveled out heavy material spillage (`3.2 lbs`) burying tail pulley and return belt span, replaced 4 locked-up return idlers (`Spec-675`), refilled fluid coupling with fresh ISO VG 32 oil (`10 lbs gal`), and installed new thermal fuse plug.
parts_used: Replacement Return Idlers (Set of 6), Motor Terminal Lug Kit

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`0.19 inch` depth) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Control board failure inside electronic drain trap housing (`4160V` component burnout) stopped firing the discharge solenoid valve.
action_taken: Replaced failed zero-loss drain control module (`P/N 6366-A`), cleaned internal capacitance sensor probes (`0.014 gap`), and verified auto-discharge.
parts_used: Drain Trap Control Module PCB, Capacitance Probe Cleaning Pad

symptom_description: Ops reported pump running hot (`110`°C) with severely restricted output flow (`49%` flow drop). Suspect ragball or solid debris blockage in volute.
root_cause: Accumulation of fibrous wipes, rags, and solid debris (`6.5 lbs`) wrapped tightly around multi-vane impeller leading edges after `12533` hours.
action_taken: Pulled pump out of wet well, manually cleared `2.8 lbs` fibrous ragball from impeller vanes, and flushed volute chamber with high-pressure hose (`40 PSI`).
parts_used: Suction Screen Fasteners, Volute O-Ring

symptom_description: Feedwater pump struggling to maintain level (`220 Amps` high draw). Feedwater piping pressure unusually high (`38 PSI`).
root_cause: Under-dosing of internal boiler scale treatment chemical (`phosphate/polymer dispersant`) over past `10 months` due to chemical pump air-lock.
action_taken: Mechanically scraped tubesheet and lower drum surfaces through handholes, flushed heavy scale debris (`7.7 lbs`) from bottom header, rebuilt automatic surface blowdown controller (`P/N 3182-A`), and replaced water softener resin.
parts_used: Low-Water Cutoff Float Bowl Rebuild Kit, Manway Spiral Wound Gasket, Phosphate Scale Inhibitor (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Cooling efficiency degraded (`+121`°C higher leaving water temp). Inspection showed `0.61` in/sec vibration from water hammering in header.
root_cause: Structural collapse of fiberglass distribution header pipe (`1.0 ft` section) due to winter freeze damage, dumping water straight into basin.
action_taken: Replaced shattered fiberglass header section (`Spec-168`), installed new target nozzles (`P/N 9202-REV2`), flushed system of fiberglass shards (`6.3 lbs`), and verified distribution pattern.
parts_used: FRP Header Pipe Section (10ft), Flange Gasket Kit, Target Spray Nozzle Set (12x)

symptom_description: Ops reported accelerated gravel-like buzzing/humming inside pump housing during peak flow (`778 GPM`). Suction gauge fluctuating +/- 18 PSI.
root_cause: Air entrainment in suction pipe due to degraded suction valve stem packing and low feed tank level (`< 56%` capacity remaining).
action_taken: Replaced suction valve stem packing (`P/N 1075-C`), purged air from suction manifold, and verified tank minimum level interlock setpoint (`> 49%`).
parts_used: Suction Valve Packing Rings, O-Ring Kit

symptom_description: Stator phase winding failed during high-load ramp (`251 Amps`). Polarization Index (PI) dropped to `1.7%` with significant smoke from terminal box.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 64%` above rated `36 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`125`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`P/N 9312-X`), renewed lead lugs (`93 ft-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.40` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.013 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: Annual boiler safety valve pop test failed: valve stuck closed during lever lifting test (`69 ft-lbs` pull) or opened `15.9 PSI` above stamped ASME set pressure.
root_cause: Improper pipe support on discharge vent piping exerted mechanical binding twisting strain (`368 in-lbs`) on safety valve body, distorting internal seat alignment.
action_taken: Swapped out defective safety valve with NBBI certified replacement assembly (`P/N 3008-REV2`), renewed flange gaskets and high-tensile studs, and documented ASME pop test during firing startup.
parts_used: NBBI Certified Safety Valve 2-inch, Spiral Wound Gasket, High-Tensile Studs & Nuts

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from transformer tank. Infrared scan showed `concerning` localized heating around LV bushing terminations (`115°C`).
root_cause: External radiator fins heavily clogged (`33%` blocked) with airborne cottonwood fluff, dust, and industrial dirt, reducing convective heat rejection by `> 50%`.
action_taken: Thoroughly washed exterior radiator cooling fins to remove cottonwood/dirt blockage (`2.0 lbs`), replaced 2 burned-out cooling fan motors (`Spec-893`), and checked oil level indicator.
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assemblies (Set of 2), Fan Control Thermostat Switch, Radiator Fin Cleaner

symptom_description: Boiler stack temperature steadily rising (`reaching 104°C vs design 210°C at high fire`), indicating severe loss of waterside heat transfer efficiency.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids (`39 ppm ppm TDS`) and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Circulated inhibited sulfamic acid descaling solution (`Spec-956`) through boiler waterside loop for `21222` hours, neutralized and flushed until pH neutral, inspected tubes (`scale completely cleared`), and renewed handhole gaskets.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `96`°C (`alarm > 85°C`). High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.54` in/sec RMS) detected. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from CNV-602.
root_cause: Over-greasing by maintenance personnel caused excessive churning heat (`122`°C) and blown grease retainer seals (`0.05 inch` gap).
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings (`Spec-154`), installed shaft grounding ring (`Spec-620`) to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit within `0.012 gap`.
parts_used: DE Ball Bearing, NDE Insulated Bearing, AEGIS Shaft Grounding Ring Kit

symptom_description: Ops noted heavy liquid water spray (`276 GPM`) when blowing down downstream pneumatic regulator bowls. Dryer separator drain stuck closed. Inspected power and control interconnects running to COMP-201 during diagnostic routine.
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles (`39 ppm`) from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced jammed internal float assembly with upgraded heavy-duty electronic zero-loss condensate drain trap (`Spec-520`) and flushed separator bowl (`604 GPM`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: Belt edge torn and fraying (`25%` internal fabric carcass cords exposed and catching on conveyor frame brackets).
root_cause: Mechanical fastener/lacing splice pulled apart (`59%` tension) and caught on fixed belt scraper blade, ripping belt edge open.
action_taken: Performed hot vulcanized splice repair (`89°C`) on torn belt section, removed jammed tramp metal (`3.5 lbs`) from transfer chute, and installed new heavy-duty urethane skirt board sealing strips.
parts_used: Hot Vulcanizing Splice Kit & Gum Rubber, Primary Belt Cleaner Scraper Blade, Urethane Skirt Strip

symptom_description: Megger insulation resistance check across panel busbars to ground measured `0.43 Mega-ohms` (`critical hazard threshold < 1.0 M-ohm`).
root_cause: Transient overvoltage strike (`460V` peak) exceeded dielectric breakdown limit of degraded busbar shrink-tubing insulation (`0.10 inch` remaining).
action_taken: Replaced cracked standoff insulators (`Spec-161`), re-torqued bus supports (`63 ft-lbs`), thoroughly vacuumed and solvent cleaned panel cabinet (`Spec-173`), and installed rodent screens on all cabinet ventilation louvers.
parts_used: GPO-3 Insulator Set, Bus Mount Bolts, Dielectric Cleaning Solvent

symptom_description: Air dryer dew point gauge reading `109`°C (high dew point alarm active). Suction pressure on refrigerant compressor reading near `0` PSI (`target 34 PSI`).
root_cause: Fretting wear between rubbing copper refrigerant lines (`0.08 inch` worn away) inside cabinet wore through tubing wall over `34 months`.
action_taken: Replaced leaking Schrader valve cores and service caps (`P/N 4652-B`), pulled deep vacuum to verify holding, and recharged refrigerant to nameplate specification (`58 lbs`).
parts_used: Schrader Valve Cores & Brass Caps, R-134a Refrigerant (4 lbs), Filter Drier Element

symptom_description: Continuous thermal cycling alarms (`94`°C trip setpoint). Cooling airflow exiting fan cover feels severely restricted (`35%` drop).
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 23 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling, leading to severe thermal stagnation (`120`°C).
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage (`230V`), deep cleaned motor heat sink fins, and verified winding temp dropped (`-96`°C).
parts_used: Cooling Fan Blade Assembly, Shroud Fasteners, Fan Guard Grid

symptom_description: VFD indicating ground fault trip on cooling tower fan feed. Megger test shows dead short (`0.08 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) on motor leads.
root_cause: Gearbox input shaft lip seal failure (`0.22 inch` gap) allowed moisture ingress, turning lubricating gear oil into an emulsion (`39%` water).
action_taken: Drained emulsified gearbox oil, replaced input shaft seal (`Spec-102`), installed new severe-duty motor (`Spec-715`), and refilled with `69 lbs gal` synthetic gear lube.
parts_used: Gearbox Input Seal, Synthetic Gear Oil ISO 220 (5 Gal), Severe-Duty Motor 20HP

symptom_description: Main breaker thermal-magnetic trip unit tripping on Phase C overload (`110 Amps`), but actual phase current is normal. Heat from loose connection conducting into breaker thermal element.
root_cause: Galvanic corrosion and oxidation between dissimilar metals (`copper cable to aluminum bus lug`) causing high joint contact resistance (`0.59 Mega-ohms`).
action_taken: Cleaned arced busbar contact surfaces, installed new silver-plated copper splice plates (`Spec-463`) and high-tensile hardware with Belleville washers, and verified micro-ohm contact resistance (`< 0.32 Mega-ohms`).
parts_used: Bus Splice Hardware Kit, Silver Plated Splice Plate, Belleville Washer Set (20-Pack)

symptom_description: Electronic trip unit on main breaker showing fault LED flashing (`57 Hz`). Breaker fails to close or reset (`drastic` mechanical binding in handle lever).
root_cause: Mechanical binding and hardening of factory grease (`0.15 inch` thick buildup) inside breaker operating mechanism due to lack of periodic exercising over `25` years.
action_taken: De-energized distribution panel, removed failed molded case breaker, installed new exact-replacement MCCB (`P/N 9833-REV2`) with calibrated electronic trip unit, and tested via secondary injection.
parts_used: Replacement Molded Case Circuit Breaker (MCCB 400A), Busbar Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Cooling efficiency degraded (`+95`°C higher leaving water temp). Inspection showed `0.22` in/sec vibration from water hammering in header. Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on CHILL-301.
root_cause: Severe algae and biological slime mats (`0.14 inch` thick) broke loose from distribution header piping and lodged inside target spray nozzles.
action_taken: Disassembled and cleaned 36 target spray nozzles (`P/N 4082-C`), flushed main distribution header piping, installed new coarse inlet strainer baskets (`Spec-349`), and shock-chlorinated tower.
parts_used: Replacement Distribution Nozzles (24-Pack), Coarse Mesh Inlet Strainer Basket, Shock Biocide (5 Gal)

symptom_description: Compressed air dew point reading normal (`108`°C) but downstream coalescing filters rapidly flooding with liquid condensate (`60%` saturation).
root_cause: Internal float mechanism of pneumatic zero-loss drain jammed shut due to heavy rust particles (`67 ppm`) from aging inlet piping.
action_taken: Replaced jammed internal float assembly with upgraded heavy-duty electronic zero-loss condensate drain trap (`P/N 3424-B`) and flushed separator bowl (`286 GPM`).
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Electronic Drain Trap Assembly, Strain Mesh Filter

symptom_description: High leakage current (`0.31 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) to earth. Stator winding temperature RTD spiked abruptly to `117`°C before trip.
root_cause: Localized stator core lamination short (`94`°C hotspot) burnt through adjacent winding slot liner during `23275` hours of high-load running.
action_taken: Disassembled motor, performed lamination core restacking and acid burn, completed Class H rewind (`P/N 5760-REV2`), and tested under full load (`71 Amps` at `480V +/- 2%`).
parts_used: Stator Lamination Restack Kit, Rewind Coil Set Class H, Lead Wire Assembly

symptom_description: Loud localized buzzing and arcing sound (`growling`) heard inside distribution panel enclosure. Localized persistent discoloration on bus connection bolts (`26%` torque loss). Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to XFMR-401.
root_cause: Creep (cold flow) of aluminum feeder cables inside mechanical set-screw lugs (`Spec-878`) reduced contact pressure by `13%`.
action_taken: Cut back heat-damaged aluminum cable (`5.0 ft`), installed new dual-rated compression lugs (`Spec-235`) using hydraulic crimper, and terminated to bus with new hardware.
parts_used: Dual-Rated Al/Cu Compression Lugs 600MCM (3-Pack), Heat Shrink Tubing (Thick Wall), No-Ox Paste

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.61` in/sec RMS) with `noticeable` harmonics. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from PUMP-101.
root_cause: Improper drive belt tension (`67 ft-lbs` over-tension) applied radial load exceeding bearing C values, causing premature race spalling.
action_taken: Pulled motor end shield, pressed on new roller bearing set (`Spec-883`), adjusted belt tension to `158 ft-lbs`, and verified temperature stabilized at `100`°C.
parts_used: Heavy Duty Roller Bearing Set, Belt Tensioning Bolts, Lip Seal Kit

symptom_description: High water content (`21 ppm`) in barrier oil reservoir. No external leak visible yet but lower mechanical seal compromised (`8.3 PSI` drop).
root_cause: Corrosion (`pH 5.9`) of lower seal housing lip due to aggressive wastewater chemistry thinned seal retainer by `66%` after `9 months`.
action_taken: Renewed tandem mechanical seals (`Spec-580`), replaced corroded seal retainer ring (`P/N 3143-REV2`), and verified zero drop on 30-minute pressure decay test (`57 PSI`).
parts_used: Seal Repair Kit, Retainer Ring, O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Evaporator approach temperature expanded (`88`°C). Chiller surging repeatedly (`27 Hz`) due to high lift requirements from fouled tubes.
root_cause: Ingestion of plastic debris and leaves (`4.3 lbs`) past cooling tower strainers partially plugged `13%` of condenser tube inlets.
action_taken: Removed water box covers, manually rodded out `78%` tube blockage (`4.2 lbs` removed), installed upgraded strainer baskets (`Spec-152`), and reassembled with new gaskets.
parts_used: Water Box Gasket Set, Inlet Strainer Baskets (2x), Tube Cleaning Rods

symptom_description: Heavy white/brown mineral scale (`0.08 inch` crust thickness) visible on PVC fill media and drift eliminators during weekly inspection.
root_cause: High cycles of concentration (`> 6.0`) operated without adequate bleed-off rate (`728 GPM` deficit) due to stuck automatic conductivity blowdown valve (`Spec-911`).
action_taken: Pressure washed PVC fill pack and drift eliminators with low-pressure wide-fan nozzle (`19 PSI`), repaired conductivity blowdown valve (`P/N 6539-B`), and calibrated chemical dosing (`265 ml/min`).
parts_used: Cooling Tower Spray Nozzles (12-Pack), Conductivity Blowdown Solenoid Valve Rebuild Kit

symptom_description: High torque alarm active on conveyor drive controller. Motor frame temperature `123`°C (`concerning` overheating). Conveyor struggling to start under load. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on MOTOR-602.
root_cause: Conveyor overloaded beyond maximum design capacity (`surge loading from upstream bin discharge exceeding 84% TPH`).
action_taken: Cleared excess surge material load (`2.2 lbs`) from belt carrying surface, freed up 6 jammed idler rollers under skirt board, reset motor thermal overload relay, and verified normal running draw (`112 Amps`).
parts_used: Fluid Coupling Thermal Fuse Plug 140°C, ISO VG 32 Fluid Coupling Oil (2 Gallons), Replacement Return Idlers (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Conveyor belt slipping on the drive pulley (`35%` slip). Motor running at `57 Hz Hz` but belt speed is zero. Ops reported load fluctuations on MOTOR-602 coinciding with this fault.
root_cause: Loss of lagging (`17%` missing) on the drive pulley causing slip. The control system ramps up speed (`22 Hz Hz`) to compensate, overloading the motor.
action_taken: Re-lagged drive pulley (`Spec-897`) with diamond tread rubber (`0.05 inch` thick), tightened take-up (`108 ft-lbs` tension), and verified zero slip with tachometer.
parts_used: Ceramic Lagging Strips, Cold Vulcanizing Adhesive, Tensioning Bolts

symptom_description: Loud high humming and `144` Amps locked rotor current (`LRA`) when compressor attempts to start. Main breaker trips after 3 seconds.
root_cause: Single-phasing or severe voltage dip (`13%` drop on `480V +/- 3%` feed) damaged hermetic compressor start winding over `24109` hours.
action_taken: Replaced internal hermetic refrigeration compressor assembly (`P/N 2812-REV2`), installed new suction/liquid line filter driers (`Spec-549`), pulled deep vacuum, and recharged system (`15 lbs`).
parts_used: Hermetic Scroll Compressor Unit, Liquid Line Drier, R-407C Refrigerant (8 lbs)

symptom_description: Stage 2 intercooling pressure fluctuating (`41 PSI +/- 62%`). Severe acoustic impact (`hissing`) detected inside discharge valve pocket.
root_cause: Over-torquing of valve cover hold-down bolts (`49 ft-lbs`) warped valve seat assembly by `0.004 inch`, causing internal blow-by.
action_taken: Rebuilt concentric valve assemblies (`Spec-136`), honed valve seating pockets (`0.010 tolerance`), and verified interstage pressure (`16 PSI`).
parts_used: Concentric Valve Rebuild Kit, Valve Pocket O-Rings, Synthetic Lubricant

symptom_description: Low refrigerant charge alarm active on scroll chiller controller. Tech noted noticeable oil residue on condenser header braze joint (`0.015 gap`). Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on TOWER-302.
root_cause: Micro-leak (`0.017 inch` pinhole) at copper U-bend braze joint on air-cooled condenser coil due to continuous fan vibration (`0.56` in/sec) and thermal cycling.
action_taken: Performed electronic leak check, located micro-leak at condenser coil U-bend, recovered remaining charge, silver brazed repair (`Spec-139`), evacuated to 350 microns, and weighed in factory charge of R-410A (`15 lbs`).
parts_used: R-410A Refrigerant Charge (22 lbs), Liquid Line Filter Drier, Silver Braze Alloy

symptom_description: Main molded case circuit breaker (`MCCB`) failed to trip during downstream short circuit event (`150 Amps` fault), causing upstream feeder breaker to clear fault.
root_cause: Shunt trip coil burnout (`0.26 Mega-ohms` open circuit) preventing remote safety interlock system from opening breaker (`19 months` delay).
action_taken: Swapped out jammed circuit breaker assembly, installed new shunt trip accessory coil (`P/N 6587-A`), torqued busbar connections to `69 ft-lbs`, and performed insulation resistance test (`57%`).
parts_used: Draw-Out Circuit Breaker Assembly 800A, Shunt Trip Coil 120VAC, Phase Barrier Kit

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`0.67` in/sec RMS, `52%` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly (`cavitation crackling`).
root_cause: Uneven accumulation of heavy dried process cake and dirt (`0.21 inch` layer) inside rotor cooling channels and external fan blades.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe (`0.006 inch`), and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade (`0.68` in/sec).
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assembly, Shaft Key, Balancing Weights

symptom_description: Submersible pump drawing fluctuating current (`158 Amps +/- 56%`) with severe acoustic chattering (`high-pitched squealing`) inside intake bellmouth.
root_cause: Inlet suction screen (`80-mesh`) completely blinded off (`41%` blocked) by floating debris and grease buildup in wet well (`pH 8.5`).
action_taken: Disassembled volute casing, removed `1.5 lbs` heavy silt/rag blockage, and checked impeller wear ring clearances (`0.006 gap`).
parts_used: Wear Ring Set, Casing O-Ring

symptom_description: Motor shaking severely (`0.52` in/sec RMS) right after routine cleaning. No electrical anomalies detected on phase currents (`82 Amps`).
root_cause: Loss of balancing weight (`4.1 lbs` mass detached) from cooling fan or rotor end ring due to vibration fatigue (`0.46` in/sec) over `8891` hours.
action_taken: Disassembled cooling fan shroud, cleaned rotor assembly (`5.1 lbs` dirt cleared), and performed in-situ two-plane dynamic field balancing using trim weights (`P/N 1422-C`).
parts_used: Dynamic Balancing Trim Weight Kit, Fan Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Compressor short cycling (`49 Hz`) on low-pressure cutout switch (`< 61 PSI`). Tech observed unusual oil residue on copper brazed joint near evaporator.
root_cause: Compressor discharge line vibration (`18 Hz` frequency) work-hardened and cracked the copper stub-out at the hermetic shell weld.
action_taken: Cut out cracked discharge line section, silver-brazed new vibration loop (`P/N 4807-B`), changed liquid line drier, and pulled vacuum before recharging `20 lbs`.
parts_used: Vibration Absorber Loop 3/8", Silver Solder Kit, R-407C (5 lbs)

symptom_description: Stator winding ground fault triggered ground fault interrupter at `30 Amps`. IR scan showed localized casing hot spot (`115`°C).
root_cause: Stator winding ground fault (`0.22 Mega-ohms` resistance) caused by internal magnetic vibration (`0.68` in/sec) chafing insulation against stator core slots.
action_taken: Installed spare submersible motor unit (`Spec-997`), renewed mechanical seals (`0.005 gap`) and power cable gland, and verified proper rotation and current (`269 Amps`).
parts_used: Submersible Motor Unit Spare, Lower Mechanical Seal Assembly, Dielectric Oil 1 Gal

symptom_description: Belt tension sensor alarm (`< 84 ft-lbs` static tension). Visual inspection revealed cracked cogs (`21%` cracked) across matched V-belt set. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to DRYER-202.
root_cause: Thermal degradation (`141`°C ambient inside guard) caused premature elastomer hardening and cross-cracking across belt ribs.
action_taken: Replaced drive belt set (`P/N 2897-X`), installed shaft seal repair kit (`Spec-289`) to stop oil drip, and tensioned belts to sonic frequency (`28 Hz`).
parts_used: Matched V-Belt Pack, Compressor Shaft Lip Seal, Belt Degreaser

symptom_description: Conductivity of boiler water unexpectedly low (`0.09 Mega-ohms uS/cm`) despite high chemical feed, indicating massive dilution from makeup water.
root_cause: Soot blower steam impingement (`31 PSI`) eroded the tube wall thickness over `10` years of operation.
action_taken: Replaced steam-eroded tubes (`Spec-467`), recalibrated soot blower steam pressure regulator (`37 PSI`), and verified impingement angles.
parts_used: Heavy Wall Boiler Tubes, Soot Blower Valve Rebuild Kit, Gasket Sheet

symptom_description: Mechanical belt rip detector interlock tripped, stopping conveyor immediately. Inspection revealed persistent puncture hole (`6.6 inch` diameter) through entire belt thickness.
root_cause: Chemical degradation (`pH 8.5`) softened the top cover, allowing normal material impact to tear the rubber (`69%` degradation).
action_taken: Stitched longitudinal tear (`5.1 ft`) with rip repair fasteners (`P/N 3922-C`), replaced worn skirt rubber (`P/N 1029-C`), and recalibrated rip detector.
parts_used: Rip Repair Fasteners (Box of 100), Skirtboard Rubber (50ft), Fastener Template

symptom_description: Hot gas bypass valve fully open (`54%`) but dew point remains high (`107`°C). Leak detection dye visible near condenser return bend.
root_cause: Degraded Schrader access valve core O-ring (`P/N 6245-REV2`) allowed slow loss of R-134a/R-407C refrigerant charge (`-19%` loss) over past 6 months.
action_taken: Repaired pinhole braze leak at evaporator inlet header, installed new bi-flow filter drier (`Spec-561`), and charged unit with precise weight of R-134a (`46 lbs`).
parts_used: Filter Drier Core Assembly, Braze Alloy, R-134a Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Compressor trips on high discharge pressure (`35 PSI`) but gauge shows low lift. Thermal imaging shows internal bypass heating (`109`°C shell).
root_cause: Prolonged operation with marginal oil return (`< 90%%` level) caused metal-to-metal scoring (`0.26 inch` deep) between orbiting and fixed scroll wraps.
action_taken: Swapped out damaged scroll compressor with factory replacement (`Spec-447`), installed new phase monitor relay (`Spec-592`) to prevent reverse rotation, pulled deep vacuum, and recharged R-410A (`14 lbs`).
parts_used: Scroll Compressor Unit, Phase Monitor Protection Relay, Filter Drier, R-410A Refrigerant Bottle

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.53` in/sec RMS) with `progressive` harmonics.
root_cause: Improper drive belt tension (`56 ft-lbs` over-tension) applied radial load exceeding bearing C values, causing premature race spalling.
action_taken: Pulled motor end shield, pressed on new roller bearing set (`P/N 4696-C`), adjusted belt tension to `255 in-lbs`, and verified temperature stabilized at `122`°C.
parts_used: Heavy Duty Roller Bearing Set, Belt Tensioning Bolts, Lip Seal Kit

symptom_description: Radial vibration velocity (`0.55` in/sec RMS) peaking at `1X` running speed (`22 Hz`). Phase angle steady across drive-end bearing pedestal.
root_cause: Improper key length (`0.021 inch` excess key protruding) installed on drive coupling extension during previous coupling replacement.
action_taken: Replaced half-key on coupling shaft extension with precision stepped key (`Spec-358`), re-laser aligned (`0.011 gap`), and verified 1X vibration dropped (`0.31` in/sec).
parts_used: Precision Stepped Shaft Key, Coupling Shim Pack

symptom_description: Conductivity of boiler water unexpectedly low (`0.51 Mega-ohms uS/cm`) despite high chemical feed, indicating massive dilution from makeup water.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation (`< 95°C` stack temp).
action_taken: Opened fireside doors, plugged 2 leaking tubes using certified tapered steel boiler tube plugs (`Spec-864`) as temporary repair, calibrated oxygen scavenger chemical dosing pump, and scheduled full retubing during summer outage.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Journal bearing RTD temperature spiked (`105`°C, `alarm > 90°C`). Distinct slight grinding growling observed during compressor coast-down. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to TOWER-301.
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear (`0.018 inch` babbit loss) of journal and thrust hydrodynamic babbitt bearings after `10749` hours of high-speed centrifugal duty.
action_taken: Disassembled compressor drive end, installed new precision babbitt bearing set (`P/N 7684-A`), calibrated oil pressure regulating valve (`14 PSI`), and performed full oil flush.
parts_used: Precision Thrust Bearing Pad Kit, Internal Oil Filter Cartridge, Compressor Gasket Set, Synthetic POE Lube

symptom_description: Scroll compressor amp draw fluctuating erratically (`82` Amps). Chiller failing to pull down process loop temperature (`+116`°C deficit).
root_cause: Scroll tip seal wear (`0.011 inch` gap) and flank wear caused by liquid refrigerant slugging (`33%` floodback) during low-ambient startup without crankcase heater energized.
action_taken: Recovered refrigerant circuit B, cut out worn scroll compressor, brazed in exact replacement scroll compressor assembly (`Spec-617`), replaced liquid line drier, evacuated to 400 microns, and weighed in R-410A charge (`81 lbs`).
parts_used: Replacement Tandem Scroll Compressor Assembly (15HP), Bi-Flow Filter Drier Core, R-410A Refrigerant (25 lbs)

symptom_description: Oil analysis report indicates high acid number (`TAN > 1.9%`) and severe particulate depletion (`171 ppm` wear metals) of anti-wear additives. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit DRYER-201.
root_cause: Air/oil separator element rupture (`0.25 inch` tear) caused by differential pressure spikes (`> 52 PSI`) during rapid load/unload cycling.
action_taken: Installed upgraded coalescence separator element (`Spec-303`), drained emulsified oil (`49 lbs`), flushed sump, and verified `< 2 ppm` carryover.
parts_used: Coalescing Air/Oil Separator, Synthetic PAO Oil (10 Gal), Flushing Solvent

symptom_description: Megger insulation resistance between HV and LV windings dropped `35%` compared to factory baseline (`reading 0.58 Mega-ohms Mega-ohms at 5kV`).
root_cause: Transient overvoltages (`480V` spike) from switching surges and lightning strikes caused micro-perforations and partial discharge inside inter-turn paper insulation.
action_taken: De-energized transformer, performed comprehensive electrical testing (TTR, Winding Resistance, Sweep Frequency Response Analysis), dried oil via vacuum rig, and added antioxidant additives (`Spec-548`).
parts_used: Inhibited Dielectric Mineral Oil (50 Gal), Transformer Breather Assembly, Antioxidant Oil Additive Package

symptom_description: Pump lost power suddenly (`0 Amps` draw). Cable strain relief failed allowing cable weight (`35 lbs`) to rub against concrete pit wall (`0.24` in/sec vibration).
root_cause: Improper clamping (`326 in-lbs` torque) of cable strain relief allowed cable weight (`46 lbs`) to pull on terminal entry gland, tearing outer polyurethane jacket.
action_taken: Spliced and potted cable using marine-grade resin splice kit (`Spec-647`), and installed protective stainless abrasion sleeve (`Spec-831`) over guide rail area.
parts_used: Marine Resin Cable Splice Kit, Stainless Abrasion Sleeve

symptom_description: Dryer refrigeration compressor hot to touch (`111`°C) and tripping on low suction pressure cutoff (`9.0 PSI`) during afternoon shift.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole (`0.014 inch` diameter) developed inside air-to-refrigerant heat exchanger due to acidic condensate (`pH 6.2`) accumulation.
action_taken: Located leak using electronic leak detector, repaired rubbed copper tubing section, replaced liquid line filter drier (`P/N 5397-X`), evacuated system, and recharged with R-407C (`19 lbs`).
parts_used: R-407C Refrigerant Charge (8 lbs), Hermetic Filter Drier, Copper Tubing Section

symptom_description: Loss of pump efficiency (`31%` drop) over `24 months`. High frequency flow turbulence (`0.22` in/sec RMS) measured across volute.
root_cause: Severe erosive wear (`0.12 inch` metal loss) on impeller vanes due to entrained abrasive solid particulates (`170 ppm`) over `10962` runtime hours.
action_taken: Disassembled pump rotating element, installed new 316SS trimmed impeller (`P/N 9383-X`) and casing wear rings, setting clearance to `0.016 inch`.
parts_used: 316SS Impeller, Casing Wear Ring, Impeller Key

symptom_description: Oil moisture content critically high (`95 ppm ppm`). Breakdown voltage (dielectric strength) dropped to `460V kV` (`warning < 30kV`).
root_cause: Moisture ingress into dielectric oil (`water content > 92 ppm ppm`) absorbed by cellulose paper insulation, drastically reducing breakdown voltage capacity (`< 230V kV`).
action_taken: Performed on-site vacuum oil processing and Fuller's earth reclamation (`Spec-172`) to remove polar compounds and acids, dried winding cellulose, and re-tested power factor (`Tan-Delta < 0.4%`).
parts_used: Vacuum Rig Filter Elements, Type II Dielectric Oil Top-off (30 Gal), Indicating Silica Gel Desiccant

symptom_description: Belt slip alarm triggered (`drastic` RPM mismatch between motor and compressor end). Black rubber dust accumulating under drive guard (`0.04 inch` pile).
root_cause: Oil mist drip (`248 ppm` contamination) from minor shaft seal leak contaminated V-belt rubber, causing softening and loss of friction grip (`55%` grip loss).
action_taken: Swapped out glazed V-belts with new matched set (`P/N 6887-X`), verified pulley groove profiles for wear (`0.009 tolerance`), and torqued slide rail bolts (`70 ft-lbs`).
parts_used: Replacement Drive Belt Kit, Sheave Lock Bushings, Tension Bolts

symptom_description: Flow rate degraded (`428 GPM`, down `71%` from design). Pump cycling on high level alarm every `16625` minutes with persistent churning noise.
root_cause: Large solid debris (`0.20 inch` diameter block) wedged between impeller shroud and volute tongue, locking impeller partially (`124 ft-lbs` stall torque).
action_taken: Cleared clogged `40-mesh` suction screen and impeller passage; hydro-blasted wet well sump walls (`45 PSI` water) to remove grease accumulation.
parts_used: Volute Gasket Set, Suction Screen Bolts

symptom_description: Chiller controller displaying erratic leaving chilled water temperature (`reading jumps rapidly between 102°C and -15°C`). Unit locked out on freeze protection.
root_cause: Moisture ingress (`15%` RH) into immersion thermistor sensor probe pocket/well caused internal short (`0.28 Mega-ohms` resistance) across NTC thermistor element.
action_taken: Replaced leaving chilled water NTC thermistor probe (`Spec-480`), applied thermal paste (`Spec-487`) inside sensor well, and calibrated sensor offset in controller menu.
parts_used: NTC Immersion Thermistor Sensor Probe, Thermal Conductive Paste

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `98`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `94`°C (`alarm limit 140°C`).
root_cause: External cooling fins heavily caked (`0.13 inch` thick layer) with thick industrial dust and grease, reducing convective heat transfer by `20%`.
action_taken: De-energized motor, removed fan cover, and thoroughly cleaned cooling fins (`0.15 inch` buildup removed) and fan blades using dry compressed air and degreaser.
parts_used: Industrial Degreaser Solvent (2 Cans), Replacement Fan Guard Screws

symptom_description: Oil sampling revealed `224 ppm` moisture content (`cloudy emulsion`). Discharge air carryover exceeding `113 ppm` oil concentration downstream.
root_cause: Mixing of incompatible lubricant brands (`polyglycol vs PAO`) during top-off by operations caused chemical precipitation and heavy foaming (`56%` volume increase).
action_taken: Drained contaminated fluid (`473 ppm` moisture), replaced thermostatic mixing valve element (`P/N 6831-B`), renewed filters, and filled with certified compressor lubricant (`P/N 1995-A`).
parts_used: Thermostatic Bypass Valve Element, Oil Filter Assembly, Separator Element, ISO VG 46 Lube

symptom_description: Compressor unable to build discharge pressure above `32` PSI (`target 17 PSI`). High interstage temperature (`98`°C) on stage 1 cylinder.
root_cause: Over-torquing of valve cover hold-down bolts (`109 ft-lbs`) warped valve seat assembly by `0.011 inch`, causing internal blow-by.
action_taken: Rebuilt concentric valve assemblies (`P/N 8721-C`), honed valve seating pockets (`0.005 tolerance`), and verified interstage pressure (`40 PSI`).
parts_used: Concentric Valve Rebuild Kit, Valve Pocket O-Rings, Synthetic Lubricant

symptom_description: Coupling bolts loosening (`extreme` play) with localized rattling (`thumping`). Temperature across coupling guard elevated to `98`°C.
root_cause: Coupling elastomeric element failure (`47%` degradation) due to operating in high ambient temperature (`153`°C) and minor angular offset (`0.012 inch`).
action_taken: Installed upgraded high-temperature urethane coupling element (`Spec-193`), shimmed motor base (`0.12 inch`), and verified vibration dropped to `0.50` in/sec RMS.
parts_used: High-Temp Urethane Coupling Element, Stainless Shim Assortment Kit

symptom_description: Control panel showing earth fault (`480V +/- 4%`). Inspection of power cable drop revealed abnormal cuts and exposed copper armor (`65%` jacket loss).
root_cause: Continuous vibration (`0.71` in/sec RMS) and turbulence caused power cable to chafe against concrete edge of sump pit access hatch over `31102` hours.
action_taken: Replaced damaged 50-foot section of submersible power cable (`P/N 2422-B`), installed new heavy-duty cable entry gland (`39 ft-lbs` torque), and secured strain relief.
parts_used: 50ft Submersible Power Cable 4/0 AWG, Cable Entry Gland Kit, Strain Relief Grip

symptom_description: High torque alarm active on conveyor drive controller. Motor frame temperature `96`°C (`progressive` overheating). Conveyor struggling to start under load.
root_cause: Tail pulley or take-up assembly jammed with packed solid material (`5.9 lbs`), creating immense frictional drag against belt movement.
action_taken: Cleared mechanical jam inside head pulley discharge chute, re-torqued motor terminal connections (`121 ft-lbs`), checked gearbox oil level, and verified VFD current stability across full speed range (`54 Hz Hz`).
parts_used: Thermal Overload Relay Element, Take-up Slide Lubricant (1 Can), Troughing Idler Rollers (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Bearing housing running extremely hot (`96`°C) and vibrating `marked` (`0.51` in/sec RMS). Unit shut down immediately by maintenance roundsman.
root_cause: Improper bearing preload and excessive axial thrust load (`28%` above design) caused premature cage fracture and rolling element skidding.
action_taken: Replaced thrust bearing housing assembly (`P/N 4403-C`), renewed oil seals, adjusted axial preload shims (`0.28 inch`), and verified dynamic balance (`0.53` in/sec).
parts_used: Radial Bearing, Thrust Bearing Set, Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Main distribution panel tripped incoming feeder phase-to-ground fault protection (`122 Amps`). Strong excessive smell of ionized electrical arc and smoke (`113 ppm` particulates) inside cabinet.
root_cause: Transient overvoltage strike (`460V +/- 4%` peak) exceeded dielectric breakdown limit of degraded busbar shrink-tubing insulation (`0.05 inch` remaining).
action_taken: Replaced cracked standoff insulators (`Spec-629`), re-torqued bus supports (`80 ft-lbs`), thoroughly vacuumed and solvent cleaned panel cabinet (`P/N 6015-B`), and installed rodent screens on all cabinet ventilation louvers.
parts_used: GPO-3 Insulator Set, Bus Mount Bolts, Dielectric Cleaning Solvent

symptom_description: Fuel consumption increased by `19%%` per ton of steam generated (`concerning` efficiency drop). Low water cutoff float chamber fouled with sludge accumulation.
root_cause: Failure of the automatic surface blowdown controller (probe coated with `0.07 inch` scale) allowed TDS to climb to `19 ppm ppm`.
action_taken: Replaced coated conductivity probe (`Spec-648`), recalibrated auto-blowdown valve (`23 Hz` cycles/hr), and mechanically punched all firetubes (`6.5 ft` reach).
parts_used: Conductivity Probe, Blowdown Valve Actuator, Tube Punching Brushes (Set of 3)

symptom_description: Compressor speed dropping during load cycle (`71%` slip). Severe rumbling audible near drive sheave with gradual burnt rubber smell.
root_cause: Thermal degradation (`107`°C ambient inside guard) caused premature elastomer hardening and cross-cracking across belt ribs.
action_taken: Replaced drive belt set (`Spec-959`), installed shaft seal repair kit (`P/N 6950-B`) to stop oil drip, and tensioned belts to sonic frequency (`53 Hz`).
parts_used: Matched V-Belt Pack, Compressor Shaft Lip Seal, Belt Degreaser

symptom_description: High condensate water level alarm triggered on air dryer separator basin. Water pooling (`0.12 inch` depth) around bottom cabinet base.
root_cause: Degradation of drain valve internal diaphragm/seal (`23%` torn) preventing pilot opening during timed drain discharge cycles (`52 Hz`).
action_taken: Disassembled and cleaned moisture separator sump, installed new drain solenoid valve rebuild kit (`P/N 1426-A`), and verified timed discharge cycles (`43 Hz`).
parts_used: Automatic Drain Rebuild Kit, Separator Bowl Gasket

symptom_description: High leakage current (`0.19 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) to earth. Stator winding temperature RTD spiked abruptly to `101`°C before trip.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 33%` above rated `35 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`99`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`P/N 8444-REV2`), renewed lead lugs (`115 ft-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.27` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.010 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: Loud grinding and metallic clattering from bearing pedestal (`82`°C). Oil level check showed accelerated discoloration and `21 ppm` metal debris.
root_cause: Fatigue failure and flaking of rolling elements due to prolonged operation with `0.013 inch` angular misalignment and `18 PSI` load.
action_taken: Pulled bearing frame, pressed on new SKF angular contact bearings (`Spec-846`), replaced lip seals, and realigned shaft within `0.007 inch`.
parts_used: Bearing Kit 6309-C3, Lip Seal Set, Shim Pack

symptom_description: Discharge temperature differential spiked (`+105`°C across stage 2). Compressor output flow reduced (`-57%` SCFM) with intermittent clattering. Note: Vibration and harmonic resonance appear transmitted from DRYER-201.
root_cause: Over-torquing of valve cover hold-down bolts (`37 ft-lbs`) warped valve seat assembly by `0.010 inch`, causing internal blow-by.
action_taken: Rebuilt concentric valve assemblies (`P/N 5922-REV2`), honed valve seating pockets (`0.019 tolerance`), and verified interstage pressure (`79 PSI`).
parts_used: Concentric Valve Rebuild Kit, Valve Pocket O-Rings, Synthetic Lubricant

symptom_description: Longitudinal rip (`5.0 ft` length) gouged into top rubber cover of conveyor belt near loading transfer chute.
root_cause: Sharp piece of tramp metal (`P/N 2753-X`) or structural steel bracket broke off and wedged between skirt board and belt surface at loading chute, gouging belt during transit.
action_taken: Locked out unit, trimmed frayed belt edges, repaired 4-foot longitudinal top cover gouge using cold-cure urethane repair compound (`P/N 9031-A`) and rubber repair strips, and readjusted skirt board clamps.
parts_used: Cold-Cure Urethane Belt Repair Compound Kit (2 Packs), Heavy-Duty Rubber Patch Strips, Urethane Skirt Board Sealing Rubber (20ft)

symptom_description: Waterside inspection through handholes reveals `0.14 inch` thick hard calcium/silicate mineral scale crust on fire tube surfaces and furnace tube sheet.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids (`374 ppm ppm TDS`) and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Circulated inhibited sulfamic acid descaling solution (`Spec-435`) through boiler waterside loop for `9649` hours, neutralized and flushed until pH neutral, inspected tubes (`scale completely cleared`), and renewed handhole gaskets.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Tech noted gradual grease discoloration (`103 ppm` iron debris) leaking from bearing grease relief tube and metallic clattering (`growling`).
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents of `460V +/- 2%`) from VFD switching transients caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set (`Spec-536`), cleaned grease cavities of `100 ppm` debris, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly (`G2.5`).
parts_used: Bearing Kit (DE & NDE), Lip Seals, Bearing Housing Gasket

symptom_description: Flame safeguard controller (`FSG`) locked out on primary flame failure during ignition sequence. Burner blower motor running but zero flame establishment.
root_cause: Modulating linkage motor actuator slipped (`0.014 inch`) on damper shaft, causing combustion air damper to lag behind fuel valve opening during firing rate changes.
action_taken: Cleaned burner diffuser and ignition assembly, replaced cracked pilot electrode ceramic (`P/N 7678-X`), calibrated fuel/air cam profile across all firing rates, and cleared flame safeguard lockout.
parts_used: Pilot Electrode Kit, UV Scanner Lens Cleaning Swabs, Burner Front Plate Gasket

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.75` in/sec RMS) with `drastic` harmonics.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents of `480V +/- 3%`) from VFD switching transients caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set (`P/N 1346-A`), cleaned grease cavities of `171 ppm` debris, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly (`G2.5`).
parts_used: Bearing Kit (DE & NDE), Lip Seals, Bearing Housing Gasket

symptom_description: High air discharge temperature trip (`103`°C) shut down compressor package. Oil cooler radiator feels persistent hot across all passes (`120`°C). Unit overdrawing current when DRYER-202 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Internal oil cooler passages partially plugged with oil varnish deposits (`0.17 inch` layer), reducing heat transfer efficiency by `30%`.
action_taken: Circulated chemical descaling/de-varnishing agent (`Spec-507`) through internal cooler passages, flushed system (`332 GPM`), and replaced oil filter (`P/N 1147-X`).
parts_used: De-Varnishing Chemical Flush (5 Gal), Spin-On Oil Filter, Cooler Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Ops noted conveyor belt wandering back and forth (`18 Hz cycles/min`) across troughing idlers during load surges. Heavy material spillage (`noticeable`) accumulating under carry side.
root_cause: Improper tension adjustment on gravity screw take-up assembly (`54 ft-lbs` uneven tension between left and right take-up bearings).
action_taken: Installed 3 self-aligning training return idlers (`P/N 4483-B`) along return span, cleaned material off tail pulley wing rolls, squared take-up bearings, and verified belt centered under full load.
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Return Training Roller Assembly (2-Pack), Take-up Bearing Adjusting Bolt Kit

symptom_description: Zero-loss drain trap displaying fault code (`drain fault 26 Hz`). Manual override button fails to discharge any condensate from separator bowl.
root_cause: Solenoid coil burnout (`480V` supply spike) on automatic condensate drain valve (`open circuit` measured across coil terminals).
action_taken: Replaced burned-out 24V solenoid coil (`Spec-108`) and internal diaphragm repair kit on automatic condensate drain assembly; tested manual blowdown (`81 PSI`).
parts_used: 24V Drain Solenoid Coil, Diaphragm Repair Kit, Bowl O-Ring

symptom_description: Ops reported breaker handle stuck in middle/tripped position (`118 ft-lbs` resistance). Internal mechanism clicking but contacts will not latch closed. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit XFMR-401.
root_cause: Contact welding or severe arcing erosion (`0.015 gap`) across primary moving contact pads following repeated high-current fault interruptions (`> 49 Amps`).
action_taken: Replaced complete draw-out air circuit breaker (`ACB`) assembly (`P/N 2903-B`), renewed bus terminal stabs (`Spec-617`), and verified all protection settings against engineering coordination study.
parts_used: Replacement MCCB 600A Assembly, Secondary Injection Test Plug Adapter

symptom_description: Motor tripped main overload and instantaneous ground fault protection (`210 Amps`). Stator shows `114`°C localized hotspot on IR scan.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 37%` above rated `117 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`148`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`Spec-662`), renewed lead lugs (`286 in-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.35` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.020 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: Main distribution panel tripped incoming feeder phase-to-ground fault protection (`69 Amps`). Strong excessive smell of ionized electrical arc and smoke (`290 ppm` particulates) inside cabinet.
root_cause: Sharp un-chamfered edges on copper busbar splices created high localized electrical field stress (`56%` above rating), degrading adjacent insulation.
action_taken: Disassembled splice joints, radiused sharp copper edges with file (`0.011 chamfer`), applied corona-suppressing tape (`P/N 2059-X`), and re-meggered at 5kV (`0.46 Mega-ohms`).
parts_used: Semi-Conductive Corona Tape (2 Rolls), High-Voltage Splice Tape (3 Rolls), Red Insulating Varnish Spray

symptom_description: Sump pit level rising above high-water alarm setpoint (`+0.12 inch`) despite pump running continuously at `131` Amps (`230V`).
root_cause: Inlet suction screen (`60-mesh`) completely blinded off (`82%` blocked) by floating debris and grease buildup in wet well (`pH 8.7`).
action_taken: Disassembled volute casing, removed `2.9 lbs` heavy silt/rag blockage, and checked impeller wear ring clearances (`0.017 gap`).
parts_used: Wear Ring Set, Casing O-Ring

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `90`°C (`alarm > 85°C`). High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.44` in/sec RMS) detected. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from CNV-601.
root_cause: Grease dry-out and thermal degradation due to operating in elevated ambient temperature environment (`135`°C housing temp) after `21605` hours.
action_taken: De-coupled motor, removed bearing end shields, replaced both DE and NDE bearings with C3 clearance ball bearings (`P/N 9134-A`), and packed with Polyrex EM (`37%` fill).
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Evaporator pressure transducer reading `19` PSI offset compared to calibrated mechanical manifold gauge. EEV hunting wildly (`28%` open).
root_cause: Vibration chafing (`0.22 inch` insulation worn) of sensor shielded wiring harness against chiller steel frame caused intermittent ground fault on sensor loop.
action_taken: Replaced defective discharge temperature thermistor (`P/N 6216-B`), repaired chafed sensor wiring harness with heat shrink, and cleared controller lockout (`26 Hz`).
parts_used: High Temperature Thermistor Probe, Heat Shrink Tubing Kit

symptom_description: Stator RTD temperature alarm active (`114`°C). Motor drawing `175` Amps (`38%` FLA) with distinct thermal buildup on frame.
root_cause: Broken external cooling fan blade (`37%` fan area lost) caused loss of turbulent airflow across cooling ribs under `213 Amps` load.
action_taken: Replaced damaged polypropylene cooling fan (`Spec-740`), straightened bent fan cowl (`0.017 gap`), and verified full airflow restoration (`97`°C housing).
parts_used: Polypropylene Replacement Cooling Fan, Cowl Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Longitudinal rip (`6.9 ft` length) gouged into top rubber cover of conveyor belt near loading transfer chute.
root_cause: Mechanical fastener/lacing splice pulled apart (`15%` tension) and caught on fixed belt scraper blade, ripping belt edge open.
