action_taken: Performed hot vulcanized splice repair (`110°C`) on torn belt section, removed jammed tramp metal (`4.5 lbs`) from transfer chute, and installed new heavy-duty urethane skirt board sealing strips.
parts_used: Hot Vulcanizing Splice Kit & Gum Rubber, Primary Belt Cleaner Scraper Blade, Urethane Skirt Strip

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `104`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `102`°C (`alarm limit 140°C`). Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on PUMP-102.
root_cause: Broken external cooling fan blade (`25%` fan area lost) caused loss of turbulent airflow across cooling ribs under `160 Amps` load.
action_taken: Replaced damaged polypropylene cooling fan (`Spec-200`), straightened bent fan cowl (`0.009 gap`), and verified full airflow restoration (`96`°C housing).
parts_used: Polypropylene Replacement Cooling Fan, Cowl Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Excessive recirculation noise (`screeching`) inside casing and unusual pressure drop (`10.3 PSI`) across pump discharge flange.
root_cause: Foreign object impact (`7.8 lbs` solid piece ingested) chipped outer impeller vane tips and bent front shroud by `0.008 inch`.
action_taken: Extracted damaged impeller, cleared debris from volute casing, installed new dynamically balanced impeller (`P/N 7098-B`), and torqued casing bolts (`156 ft-lbs`).
parts_used: Dynamically Balanced Impeller Assembly, Casing O-Ring, Shaft Key

symptom_description: Compressor discharge superheat abnormally high (`+92`°C). Leak detector picked up `296 ppm` R-134a concentration near evaporator water box. Also inspected TOWER-301 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Leaking shaft seal on open-drive centrifugal compressor assembly caused by drying out of seal face carbon (`0.025 inch` wear) during `15 months` winter shutdown.
action_taken: Replaced open-drive compressor mechanical shaft seal assembly (`P/N 8306-X`), renewed oil separation filters (`P/N 4756-B`), evacuated system, and verified zero leak rate (`< 180 ppm ppm`).
parts_used: Centrifugal Compressor Shaft Seal Assembly, Oil Filter Element, R-134a (65 lbs)

symptom_description: Belt splice pulling apart (`0.028 inch` gap). Fasteners tearing through the belt carcass (`49%` failure).
root_cause: Mechanical fastener/lacing splice pulled apart (`35%` tension) and caught on fixed belt scraper blade, ripping belt edge open.
action_taken: Performed hot vulcanized splice repair (`102°C`) on torn belt section, removed jammed tramp metal (`3.6 lbs`) from transfer chute, and installed new heavy-duty urethane skirt board sealing strips.
parts_used: Hot Vulcanizing Splice Kit & Gum Rubber, Primary Belt Cleaner Scraper Blade, Urethane Skirt Strip

symptom_description: Thermal inspection (`IR gun`) showed seized return idler bearing reaching `101`°C. Sparks visible (`marked` hazard) under dark operating conditions.
root_cause: Incorrect bearing tolerance (`0.007`) led to inner race spinning on the shaft, causing friction welding and bearing lockup.
action_taken: Replaced seized rollers (`Spec-227`), installed deflector shields (`P/N 2745-B`) to prevent washdown water entry, and verified tracking.
parts_used: CEMA E Rollers, Water Deflector Shields, Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Severe clicking audible near drive coupling. Motor bearing temperature elevated (`106`°C) with `extreme` radial vibration (`0.69` in/sec RMS).
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of deep groove ball bearings (`0.014 inch` race play) after exceeding `10639` hours of continuous operating life.
action_taken: Disassembled motor, installed insulated NDE bearing and standard DE bearing (`Spec-758`), verified proper clearance (`0.007 gap`), and tested smooth running (`0.36` in/sec).
parts_used: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing Set, Grease Valve Kit, End Shield Gasket

symptom_description: High envelope acceleration (`g-E`) detected across drive-end bearing. Oil/grease sampling confirmed `78 ppm` particulate wear debris.
root_cause: Over-greasing by maintenance personnel caused excessive churning heat (`125`°C) and blown grease retainer seals (`0.06 inch` gap).
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings (`Spec-517`), installed shaft grounding ring (`Spec-252`) to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit within `0.010 gap`.
parts_used: DE Ball Bearing, NDE Insulated Bearing, AEGIS Shaft Grounding Ring Kit

symptom_description: Longitudinal rip (`3.9 ft` length) gouged into top rubber cover of conveyor belt near loading transfer chute.
root_cause: Belt slipped off pulley due to misalignment and caught on a rigid structural support (`0.61` stress), tearing the edge.
action_taken: Pulled `2.2 ft` of new belt, performed a hot vulcanized splice (`80°C`), adjusted primary and secondary scrapers, and ran belt unloaded.
parts_used: Conveyor Belt Roll (100ft), Hot Splice Kit, Primary Cleaner Blade

symptom_description: Multiple distribution target nozzles completely plugged (`65%` blocked) with debris, causing heavy localized channeling and splashing inside tower.
root_cause: Structural collapse of fiberglass distribution header pipe (`2.9 ft` section) due to winter freeze damage, dumping water straight into basin.
action_taken: Replaced shattered fiberglass header section (`P/N 8176-X`), installed new target nozzles (`Spec-146`), flushed system of fiberglass shards (`3.6 lbs`), and verified distribution pattern.
parts_used: FRP Header Pipe Section (10ft), Flange Gasket Kit, Target Spray Nozzle Set (12x)

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after `11484` hours of continuous running (`193 Amps`). Cooling fan shroud feels severe hot to the touch.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 23 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling, leading to severe thermal stagnation (`165`°C).
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage (`480V +/- 1%`), deep cleaned motor heat sink fins, and verified winding temp dropped (`-113`°C).
parts_used: Cooling Fan Blade Assembly, Shroud Fasteners, Fan Guard Grid

symptom_description: Ops noted pump running smoothly but failing to meet process target gpm (`29%` deficit). Hydraulic performance curve shift suspected.
root_cause: Cavitation erosion over past `4 years` eroded vane tips and widened wear ring clearances to `0.006 inch` (`normal < 0.012 inch`).
action_taken: Replaced eroded impeller assembly (`P/N 1191-X`), renewed front/rear wear rings (`0.016 inch` gap restored), and balanced rotor dynamically (`G2.5`).
parts_used: Impeller Assembly, Front and Rear Wear Rings, Casing Gasket

symptom_description: Ops noted heavy scale shedding from drift eliminators into cold water basin (`marked` debris accumulation near suction screen).
root_cause: Conductivity controller probe fouling (`0.14 inch` coating) caused false low readings (`26 Hz uS/cm`), preventing automatic blowdown initiation.
action_taken: Removed and acid-cleaned conductivity controller probe (`Spec-753`), verified calibration (`48 Hz uS/cm`), manually triggered blowdown (`791 GPM`), and flushed basin.
parts_used: Conductivity Probe Cleaning Solution, Blowdown Valve Rebuild Kit, Calibration Fluid
